tEn: Pangu-Weather: A 3D High-Resolution Model for Fast and Accurate Global Weather Forecast
tZh: 盘古天气：一种用于快速准确全球天气预报的3D高分辨率模型
sEn: Pangu-Weather is the first AI-based method to outperform traditional numerical weather prediction in accuracy across all factors and time ranges.
sZh: 盘古天气是首个在准确度上超越传统数值天气预报的AI方法，覆盖所有气象要素和时间范围。
absEn: In this paper, we present Pangu-Weather, a deep learning based system for fast and accurate global weather forecast. For this purpose, we establish a data-driven environment by downloading $43$ years of hourly global weather data from the 5th generation of ECMWF reanalysis (ERA5) data and train a few deep neural networks with about $256$ million parameters in total. The spatial resolution of forecast is $0.25^\circ\times0.25^\circ$, comparable to the ECMWF Integrated Forecast Systems (IFS). More importantly, for the first time, an AI-based method outperforms state-of-the-art numerical weather prediction (NWP) methods in terms of accuracy (latitude-weighted RMSE and ACC) of all factors (e.g., geopotential, specific humidity, wind speed, temperature, etc.) and in all time ranges (from one hour to one week). There are two key strategies to improve the prediction accuracy: (i) designing a 3D Earth Specific Transformer (3DEST) architecture that formulates the height (pressure level) information into cubic data, and (ii) applying a hierarchical temporal aggregation algorithm to alleviate cumulative forecast errors. In deterministic forecast, Pangu-Weather shows great advantages for short to medium-range forecast (i.e., forecast time ranges from one hour to one week). Pangu-Weather supports a wide range of downstream forecast scenarios, including extreme weather forecast (e.g., tropical cyclone tracking) and large-member ensemble forecast in real-time. Pangu-Weather not only ends the debate on whether AI-based methods can surpass conventional NWP methods, but also reveals novel directions for improving deep learning weather forecast systems.
absZh: 本文提出盘古天气，一种基于深度学习的快速准确全球天气预报系统。为此，我们建立了数据驱动环境，从ECMWF第五代再分析（ERA5）数据中下载了43年的每小时全球天气数据，并训练了总参数量约2.56亿的若干深度神经网络。预报的空间分辨率为0.25°×0.25°，与ECMWF综合预报系统（IFS）相当。更重要的是，AI方法首次在所有要素（如位势、比湿、风速、温度等）和所有时间范围（从1小时到1周）的准确度（纬度加权RMSE和ACC）上超越了最先进的数值天气预报（NWP）方法。提高预测精度的两个关键策略是：（i）设计了一种3D地球特定Transformer（3DEST）架构，将高度（气压层）信息公式化为立方体数据；（ii）应用分层时间聚合算法以减轻累积预报误差。在确定性预报中，盘古天气在短期到中期预报（即预报时间范围从1小时到1周）中显示出巨大优势。盘古天气支持多种下游预报场景，包括极端天气预报（如热带气旋跟踪）和实时大集合预报。盘古天气不仅结束了关于AI方法能否超越传统NWP方法的争论，还揭示了改进深度学习天气预报系统的新方向。

contrib.en: First AI-based method to surpass operational IFS in all weather factors and forecast times from 1 hour to 1 week.
contrib.zh: 首个在所有天气要素和1小时至1周预报时间上超越业务IFS的AI方法。

contrib.en: Proposes 3D Earth Specific Transformer (3DEST) integrating height information into 3D data for better atmospheric modeling.
contrib.zh: 提出3D地球专用Transformer（3DEST），将高度信息整合为3D数据以改进大气建模。

contrib.en: Introduces hierarchical temporal aggregation to reduce cumulative forecast errors by training models with multiple lead times.
contrib.zh: 引入分层时间聚合，通过训练多个不同预报时效的模型来减少累积预报误差。

contrib.en: Achieves 0.25° spatial resolution with inference speed over 10,000x faster than operational IFS on a single GPU.
contrib.zh: 实现0.25°空间分辨率，单GPU推理速度比业务IFS快10000倍以上。

contrib.en: Demonstrates strong performance in extreme weather forecast and large-member ensemble forecast scenarios.
contrib.zh: 在极端天气预报和大集合预报场景中展现出强劲性能。

contrib.en: Ends the debate on whether AI-based methods can surpass conventional NWP methods for global weather forecast.
contrib.zh: 终结了AI方法能否在全球天气预报中超越传统NWP方法的争论。

limits.en: Training data limited to 39 years of ERA5 reanalysis; longer periods may improve accuracy.
limits.zh: 训练数据仅限39年ERA5再分析数据；更长时段可能提升精度。

limits.en: Model not fully converged after 100 epochs due to computational budget constraints.
limits.zh: 受算力限制，模型在100个epoch后未完全收敛。

limits.en: 3DEST architecture requires large GPU memory, limiting network depth and input features.
limits.zh: 3DEST架构需要大量GPU内存，限制了网络深度和输入特征。

limits.en: Hierarchical temporal aggregation uses fixed lead times; adaptive selection may further reduce errors.
limits.zh: 分层时间聚合使用固定预报时效；自适应选择可能进一步减少误差。

limits.en: Extreme weather forecast tends to underestimate intensity, especially for longer forecast ranges.
limits.zh: 极端天气预报倾向于低估强度，尤其在较长预报时效上。

items.en: In this paper, we present Pangu-Weather, a deep learning based system for fast and accurate global weather forecast. For this purpose, we establish a data-driven environment by downloading 434343 years of hourly global weather data from the 5th generation of ECMWF reanalysis (ERA5) data and train a few deep neural networks with about 256256256 million parameters in total. The spatial resolution of forecast is 0.25∘×0.25∘superscript0.25superscript0.250.25^{\circ}\times 0.25^{\circ}, comparable to the ECMWF Integrated Forecast Systems (IFS). More importantly, for the first time, an AI-based method outperforms state-of-the-art numerical weather prediction (NWP) methods in terms of accuracy (latitude-weighted RMSE and ACC) of all factors (e.g., geopotential, specific humidity, wind speed, temperature, etc.) and in all time ranges (from one hour to one week). There are two key strategies to improve the prediction accuracy: (i) designing a 3D Earth Specific Transformer (3DEST) architecture that formulates the height (pressure level) information into cubic data, and (ii) applying a hierarchical temporal aggregation algorithm to alleviate cumulative forecast errors. In deterministic forecast, Pangu-Weather shows great advantages for short to medium-range forecast (i.e., forecast time ranges from one hour to one week). Pangu-Weather supports a wide range of downstream forecast scenarios, including extreme weather forecast (e.g., tropical cyclone tracking) and large-member ensemble forecast in real-time. Pangu-Weather not only ends the debate on whether AI-based methods can surpass conventional NWP methods, but also reveals novel directions for improving deep learning weather forecast systems.
items.zh: 本文提出盘古天气（Pangu-Weather），一种基于深度学习的快速准确全球天气预报系统。为此，我们建立了一个数据驱动环境，从第五代ECMWF再分析（ERA5）数据中下载了434343年的逐时全球天气数据，并训练了总参数量约256256256百万的若干深度神经网络。预报的空间分辨率为0.25°×0.25°，与ECMWF综合预报系统（IFS）相当。更重要的是，AI方法首次在所有要素（如位势、比湿、风速、温度等）和所有时间范围（从1小时到1周）的精度（纬度加权RMSE和ACC）上超越了最先进的数值天气预报（NWP）方法。提高预测精度的两个关键策略是：(i) 设计了一种3D地球特定Transformer（3DEST）架构，将高度（气压层）信息公式化为立方体数据；(ii) 应用分层时间聚合算法以减轻累积预测误差。在确定性预报中，盘古天气在短期到中期预报（即预报时间范围从1小时到1周）中显示出巨大优势。盘古天气支持广泛的下游预报场景，包括极端天气预报（如热带气旋跟踪）和实时大集合预报。盘古天气不仅结束了关于AI方法能否超越传统NWP方法的争论，还揭示了改进深度学习天气预报系统的新方向。

items.en: Weather forecast is one of the most important scenarios of scientific computing. It offers the ability of predicting future weather changes, especially the occurrence of extreme weather events (e.g., floods, droughts, hurricanes, etc.), which has large values to the society (e.g., daily activity, agriculture, energy production, transportation, industry, etc.). In the past decade, with the bloom of high-performance computational device, the community has witnessed a rapid development in the research field of numerical weather prediction (NWP) [1]. Conventional NWP methods mostly follow a simulation-based paradigm which formulates the physical rules of atmospheric states into partial differentiable equations (PDEs) and solves them using numerical simulations [2, 3, 4]. Due to the high complexity of solving PDEs, these NWP methods are often very slow, e.g., with a spatial resolution of 0.25∘×0.25∘superscript0.25superscript0.250.25^{\circ}\times 0.25^{\circ}, a single simulation procedure for 101010-day forecast can take hours of computation using hundreds of nodes in a supercomputer [5]. This largely reduces the timeliness in daily weather forecast and the number of ensemble members that can be used for probabilistic weather forecast. In addition, conventional NWP algorithms largely rely on the parametric numerical models, but these models, albeit being very complex [1], are often considered inadequate [6, 7], e.g., errors will be introduced by parameterization of unresolved processes.
items.zh: 天气预报是科学计算中最重要的场景之一。它提供了预测未来天气变化的能力，特别是极端天气事件（如洪水、干旱、飓风等）的发生，这对社会（如日常活动、农业、能源生产、交通、工业等）具有巨大价值。过去十年中，随着高性能计算设备的蓬勃发展，数值天气预报（NWP）研究领域经历了快速发展[1]。传统NWP方法大多遵循基于模拟的范式，将大气状态的物理规则公式化为偏微分方程（PDE），并使用数值模拟求解[2, 3, 4]。由于求解PDE的高度复杂性，这些NWP方法通常非常缓慢，例如，在0.25°×0.25°的空间分辨率下，一次10天预报的单一模拟过程可能需要使用超级计算机中的数百个节点花费数小时的计算时间[5]。这大大降低了日常天气预报的时效性以及可用于概率天气预报的集合成员数量。此外，传统NWP算法在很大程度上依赖于参数化数值模型，但这些模型尽管非常复杂[1]，通常被认为是不充分的[6, 7]，例如，未解析过程的参数化会引入误差。

items.en: To address the above issues, a promising direction lies in data-driven weather forecast with AI, in particular, deep learning111Throughout this paper, we will use ‘conventional NWP’ or simply ‘NWP’ to refer to the numerical simulation methods, and use ‘AI-based’ or ‘deep learning based’ to specify data-driven forecast systems. We understand that, verbally, AI-based methods also belong to NWP, but we follow the convention [8] to use these terms.. The methodology is to use a deep neural network to capture the relationship between the input (observed data) and output (target data to be predicted). On specialized computational device (e.g., GPUs), AI-based methods run very fast and easily achieve a tradeoff between model complexity, prediction resolution, and prediction accuracy [9, 10, 11, 12, 13, 14, 15]. As a recent example, FourCastNet [14] increased the spatial resolution to 0.25∘×0.25∘superscript0.25superscript0.250.25^{\circ}\times 0.25^{\circ}, comparable to the ECMWF Integrated Forecast Systems (IFS), yet it takes only 777 seconds on four GPUs for making a 100100100-member, 242424-hour forecast, which is orders of magnitudes faster than the conventional NWP methods. However, the forecast accuracy of FourCastNet is still below satisfaction, e.g., the RMSE of 555-day Z500 forecast using a single model and a 100100100-member ensemble are 484.5484.5484.5 and 462.5462.5462.5, respectively, which are much worse than 333.7333.7333.7 reported by operational IFS of ECMWF [16]. In [8], researchers conjectured that ‘a number of fundamental breakthroughs are needed’ before AI-based methods can beat NWP.
items.zh: 为了解决上述问题，一个有前景的方向是使用AI（特别是深度学习）进行数据驱动的天气预报。该方法使用深度神经网络捕捉输入（观测数据）和输出（待预测目标数据）之间的关系。在专用计算设备（如GPU）上，基于AI的方法运行非常快，并且容易在模型复杂度、预测分辨率和预测精度之间取得平衡[9, 10, 11, 12, 13, 14, 15]。最近的一个例子是FourCastNet[14]，它将空间分辨率提高到0.25°×0.25°，与ECMWF综合预报系统（IFS）相当，但仅需在四个GPU上花费7秒即可进行100成员、24小时预报，比传统NWP方法快数个数量级。然而，FourCastNet的预报精度仍不令人满意，例如，使用单一模型和100成员集合的5天Z500预报的RMSE分别为484.5和462.5，远低于ECMWF业务IFS报告的333.7[16]。在[8]中，研究人员推测，在AI方法能够击败NWP之前，“需要若干根本性突破”。

items.capEn: Figure 1: A showcase of Pangu-Weather’s forecast results. Top: Pangu-Weather claims significant advantages over operational IFS (NWP) and FourCastNet (AI-based) in terms of forecast accuracy (i) of different factors (500​h​P​a500hPa500\mathrm{hPa} geopotential, Z500, and 850​h​P​a850hPa850\mathrm{hPa} temperature, T850) and (ii) with respect to different months in year. Middle: visualization of Pangu-Weather’s 333-day forecast of 2m temperature (T2M) and 10m wind speed at 00:00 UTC, September 1st, 2018, with comparison to the ERA5 ground-truth. Bottom: Pangu-Weather produces more accurate tracking for two tropical cyclones in 2018, i.e., Typhoon Kong-rey (2018-25) and Yutu (2018-26). Specifically, Pangu-Weather predicts the correct path of Yutu (i.e., it goes to the Philippines) 484848 hours earlier than the ECMWF-HRES forecast.
items.capZh: 图1：盘古天气预报结果展示。顶部：盘古天气在不同要素（500hPa位势，Z500，和850hPa温度，T850）以及不同月份的预报精度上显著优于业务IFS（NWP）和FourCastNet（基于AI）。中部：盘古天气对2018年9月1日00:00 UTC的2米温度（T2M）和10米风速的3天预报可视化，并与ERA5真实值比较。底部：盘古天气对2018年两个热带气旋（台风康妮（2018-25）和玉兔（2018-26））的跟踪更准确。具体而言，盘古天气比ECMWF-HRES预报提前48小时预测了玉兔的正确路径（即它前往菲律宾）。

items.en: The breakthrough comes much earlier than they thought. In this paper, we present Pangu-Weather, a powerful AI-based weather forecast system that, for the first time, surpasses existing NWP methods (and, of course, AI-based methods) in terms of prediction accuracy of all factors. The test is performed on the 5th generation of ECMWF reanalysis (ERA5) data. We download 434343 years (1979–2021) of global weather data, among which we use the 1979–2017 data for training, the 2019 data for validation, and the 201820182018, 202020202020, 202120212021 data for testing. We choose 131313 pressure levels, each with 555 important variables (i.e., geopotential, specific humidity, temperature, u𝑢u-component and v𝑣v-component of wind speed), and the surface level with 444 variables (i.e., 2​m2m2\mathrm{m} temperature, u𝑢u-component and v𝑣v-component of 10​m10m10\mathrm{m} wind speed, and mean sea-level pressure).
items.zh: 突破比他们预想的来得更早。在本文中，我们提出盘古天气，一个强大的基于AI的天气预报系统，首次在所有要素的预测精度上超越了现有NWP方法（当然也包括基于AI的方法）。测试在第五代ECMWF再分析（ERA5）数据上进行。我们下载了43年（1979–2021）的全球天气数据，其中使用1979–2017年数据进行训练，2019年数据用于验证，2018年、2020年、2021年数据用于测试。我们选择了13个气压层，每层有5个重要变量（即位势、比湿、温度、风速的u分量和v分量），以及地表层的4个变量（即2米温度、10米风速的u分量和v分量、平均海平面气压）。

items.en: Some key results are summarized in Figure 1. Quantitatively, Pangu-Weather outperforms all existing weather forecast systems. In particular, with a single-member forecast, Pangu-Weather reports an RMSE of 555-day Z500 forecast of 296.7296.7296.7, significantly better than the operational IFS [16] and the previous best AI-based method (i.e., FourCastNet [14]) which reported 333.7333.7333.7 and 462.5462.5462.5, respectively. In addition, the inference cost of Pangu-Weather is merely 1,400​m​s1400ms1\rm{,}400\mathrm{ms} on a single GPU, more than 10000×10000\times faster than operational IFS and on par with FourCastNet [14]. Qualitatively, Pangu-Weather not only shows high-resolution (0.25∘×0.25∘superscript0.25superscript0.250.25^{\circ}\times 0.25^{\circ}) visualization maps (e.g., for temperature and wind speed), but also offers high-quality extreme weather forecast (e.g., for tropical cyclone tracking).
items.zh: 一些关键结果总结在图1中。定量上，盘古天气优于所有现有天气预报系统。特别是，使用单一成员预报，盘古天气报告的5天Z500预报RMSE为296.7，显著优于业务IFS[16]和之前最好的基于AI方法（即FourCastNet[14]），后者分别报告了333.7和462.5。此外，盘古天气的推理成本在单个GPU上仅为1,400毫秒，比业务IFS快超过10000倍，与FourCastNet[14]相当。定性上，盘古天气不仅展示了高分辨率（0.25°×0.25°）的可视化地图（例如温度和风速），还提供了高质量的极端天气预报（例如热带气旋跟踪）。

items.en: The technical contribution of Pangu-Weather is two-fold. First, we integrate height information (offered by different pressure levels) into a new dimension, so that the input and output of deep neural networks are in 3D forms. We further design a 3D Earth-specific transformer (3DEST) architecture to process 3D data. Our experiments show that, although 3D data require heavier computational overhead (in particular, the large memory costs obstacle us from using full observation elements and very deep network architectures), 3D models can better capture the intrinsic relationship between different pressure levels and thus yield significant accuracy gain beyond the 2D counterparts. Second, we apply a hierarchical temporal aggregation algorithm that involves training a series of models with increasing forecast lead times (i.e., 111-hour, 333-hour, 666-hour, and 242424-hour forecast). Hence, in the testing stage, the number of iterations needed for medium-range (e.g., 555-day) forecast is largely reduced and, consequently, the cumulative forecast errors are alleviated. Compared to previous methods (e.g., FourCastNet [14] applied plain temporal aggregation with recurrent optimization), our strategy is easier to implement, more stable during training, and achieves much higher medium-range forecast accuracy.
items.zh: 盘古天气的技术贡献有两个方面。首先，我们将高度信息（由不同气压层提供）整合到一个新维度中，使得深度神经网络的输入和输出为3D形式。我们进一步设计了一个3D地球特定Transformer（3DEST）架构来处理3D数据。我们的实验表明，尽管3D数据需要更大的计算开销（特别是大内存成本阻碍我们使用完整的观测要素和非常深的网络架构），但3D模型能更好地捕捉不同气压层之间的内在关系，从而在精度上显著优于2D对应模型。其次，我们应用了一种分层时间聚合算法，该算法涉及训练一系列具有递增预报提前时间（即1小时、3小时、6小时和24小时预报）的模型。因此，在测试阶段，中期（例如5天）预报所需的迭代次数大大减少，从而减轻了累积预测误差。与之前的方法（例如FourCastNet[14]使用带有循环优化的简单时间聚合）相比，我们的策略更易于实现，训练更稳定，并实现了更高的中期预报精度。

items.en: The Pangu-Weather system is built upon a GPU cluster of Huawei Cloud with 192192192 NVIDIA Tesla-V100 GPUs. Each single forecast model is trained for 100100100 epochs which take around 151515 days. To maximally support large neural networks, we use a batch size of 111 on each GPU, i.e., the overall batch size is 192192192. With diagnostic studies, we notice that the forecast accuracy continuously goes up with a larger amount of training data and/or a longer training procedure – 100100100 epochs, the maximum budget that we can use, are actually insufficient for the training procedure to arrive at full convergence. That said, the community can wait for more data (including increasing the time and/or spatial resolutions) or use more powerful computational device to improve AI-based weather forecast. The trend is similar to establishing large-scale pre-trained models in other AI scopes, e.g., computer vision [17, 18], natural language processing [19, 20], cross-modal understanding [21], and beyond.
items.zh: 盘古天气系统基于华为云的GPU集群构建，该集群拥有192个NVIDIA Tesla-V100 GPU。每个单一预报模型训练100个epoch，耗时约15天。为了最大程度支持大型神经网络，我们在每个GPU上使用批大小为1，即总批大小为192。通过诊断研究，我们注意到预报精度随着训练数据量的增加和/或训练过程的延长而持续上升——100个epoch是我们能使用的最大预算，实际上不足以使训练过程完全收敛。也就是说，社区可以等待更多数据（包括增加时间和/或空间分辨率）或使用更强大的计算设备来改进基于AI的天气预报。这一趋势类似于在其他AI领域建立大规模预训练模型，例如计算机视觉[17, 18]、自然语言处理[19, 20]、跨模态理解[21]等。

items.en: Overall, the contribution of this paper are summarized in the following three aspects:
items.zh: 总体而言，本文的贡献总结为以下三个方面：

items.en: We end the debate on whether AI-based methods can surpass NWP for global weather forecast. We establish a deep learning framework that, for the first time, surpasses operational IFS in terms of all weather factors and all forecast times from one hour to one week, meanwhile enjoying a very fast inference speed and a high spatial resolution of 0.25∘×0.25∘superscript0.25superscript0.250.25^{\circ}\times 0.25^{\circ}.
items.zh: 我们结束了关于AI方法能否在全局天气预报中超越NWP的争论。我们建立了一个深度学习框架，首次在所有天气要素和从1小时到1周的所有预报时间上超越了业务IFS，同时享有非常快的推理速度和高空间分辨率0.25°×0.25°。

items.en: Technically, we reveal several key issues that significantly improve forecast accuracy, namely, (i) using a 3D deep network to integrate height information, and (ii) applying hierarchical temporal aggregation to alleviate cumulative forecast errors. Arguably, these techniques will be more effective in the future with more powerful computational device and higher-quality training data.
items.zh: 在技术上，我们揭示了几个显著提高预报精度的关键问题，即：(i) 使用3D深度网络整合高度信息，以及 (ii) 应用分层时间聚合以减轻累积预测误差。可以说，这些技术在未来使用更强大的计算设备和更高质量的训练数据时将更加有效。

items.en: We show that Pangu-Weather can easily transfer the ability of deterministic forecast to downstream scenarios such as extreme weather forecast and large-member ensemble forecast, where timeliness is guaranteed by its fast inference speed.
items.zh: 我们展示了盘古天气可以轻松地将确定性预报的能力转移到下游场景，如极端天气预报和大集合预报，其中时效性由其快速推理速度保证。

items.en: The remainder of this paper is organized as follows. Section 2 formulates the problem and briefly reviews previous work, based on which we demonstrate our technical insights. Section 3 elaborates the Pangu-Weather system with algorithmic designs and implementation details. Section 4 shows generic forecast results and investigates two specific scenarios, namely, extreme weather forecast and large-member ensemble forecast. Section 5 draws conclusions and reveals future directions.
items.zh: 本文的其余部分组织如下。第2节形式化问题并简要回顾先前工作，在此基础上展示我们的技术见解。第3节详细阐述盘古天气系统的算法设计和实现细节。第4节展示通用预报结果并研究两个特定场景，即极端天气预报和大集合预报。第5节得出结论并揭示未来方向。

items.en: Most weather forecast systems were built upon the analysis or reanalysis beyond observation data. The reanalysis datasets are considered the best known estimation [22, 23] for most atmospheric variables except for some factors like precipitation. Throughout this paper, we make use of the ERA5 dataset, i.e., the 5th generation of ECMWF reanalysis data [24]. The ERA5 data have four dimensions, namely, latitude and longitude, pressure levels (for height) and time. We can choose an arbitrary number of weather factors (e.g., geopotential, temperature, etc.), but do not count them toward a new dimension. With a total size of over 2​P​B2PB2\mathrm{PB}, the dataset is split into 2D (latitude and longitude) slices to ease downloading. That said, given a time point (hourly within the past 606060 years), a pressure level (or Earth’s surface), and a weather factor, one can download a matrix representing the specified global reanalysis data. We denote the overall ERA5 data as 𝐀𝐀\mathbf{A}, and we use superscripts to refer to specific weather factors and pressure levels, and subscripts to indicate spatiotemporal coordinates, e.g., 𝐀tT850superscriptsubscript𝐀𝑡T850\mathbf{A}_{t}^{\mathrm{T850}} stands for the global temperature data (a matrix) at time t𝑡t and a height of 850​h​P​a850hPa850\mathrm{hPa} and 𝐀x,y,tZ500superscriptsubscript𝐀𝑥𝑦𝑡Z500\mathbf{A}_{x,y,t}^{\mathrm{Z500}} the geopotential data at position (x,y)𝑥𝑦(x,y), time t𝑡t, and a height of 500​h​P​a500hPa500\mathrm{hPa} – note that 𝐀x,y,tZ500superscriptsubscript𝐀𝑥𝑦𝑡Z500\mathbf{A}_{x,y,t}^{\mathrm{Z500}} is a single number.
items.zh: 大多数天气预报系统建立在观测数据之外的分析或再分析基础上。再分析数据集被认为是大多数大气变量（除了一些要素如降水）的最佳已知估计[22, 23]。在本文中，我们使用ERA5数据集，即第五代ECMWF再分析数据[24]。ERA5数据有四个维度，即纬度和经度、气压层（高度）和时间。我们可以选择任意数量的天气要素（例如位势、温度等），但不将其视为一个新维度。数据集总大小超过2PB，被分割成2D（纬度和经度）切片以便下载。也就是说，给定一个时间点（过去60年内的逐时）、一个气压层（或地球表面）和一个天气要素，可以下载一个表示指定全局再分析数据的矩阵。我们将整体ERA5数据记为A，并使用上标表示特定天气要素和气压层，下标表示时空坐标，例如，A_t^T850表示时间t、高度850hPa的全球温度数据（一个矩阵），A_{x,y,t}^Z500表示位置(x,y)、时间t、高度500hPa的位势数据——注意A_{x,y,t}^Z500是一个单一数值。

items.en: Based on the ERA5 data, the problem of weather forecast is clearly defined: given an initial time t0subscript𝑡0t_{0}, the algorithm shall make use of all historical weather data (i.e., 𝐀t∗superscriptsubscript𝐀𝑡∗\mathbf{A}_{t}^{\ast} for t⩽t0𝑡subscript𝑡0t\leqslant t_{0}) to predict future weather data (i.e., 𝐀t∗superscriptsubscript𝐀𝑡∗\mathbf{A}_{t}^{\ast} for t>t0𝑡subscript𝑡0t>t_{0}), where ∗∗\ast stands for all factors. Before starting a survey on existing methods, we first note that the resolution of weather data is large due to the following facts. First, there are 37×21+262372126237\times 21+262 observation factors in total (373737 pressure levels, each of which has 212121 weather variables, and a surface that has 262262262 variables), and it is believed that different elements can impact each other (e.g., temperature is highly correlated to geopotential). Second, ERA5 provides about 606060 years of hourly observation data, i.e., the scale of time axis is over 105superscript10510^{5}. Third, the spatial resolution is 0.25∘×0.25∘superscript0.25superscript0.250.25^{\circ}\times 0.25^{\circ}, implying that each frame of global weather data is of 1440×72014407201440\times 720 numbers (i.e., ‘pixels’ or ‘voxels’ if the data is to be processed by deep neural networks). As we shall see later, the high complexity has raised serious concerns on computational costs for both NWP and AI-based methods.
items.zh: 基于ERA5数据，天气预报问题被明确定义：给定初始时间t0，算法应利用所有历史天气数据（即t≤t0时的A_t^*）来预测未来天气数据（即t>t0时的A_t^*），其中*表示所有要素。在开始调查现有方法之前，我们首先注意到天气数据的分辨率很大，原因如下。首先，总共有37×21+262个观测要素（37个气压层，每层有21个天气变量，以及地表有262个变量），并且认为不同要素可以相互影响（例如，温度与位势高度相关）。其次，ERA5提供了约60年的逐时观测数据，即时间轴的规模超过10^5。第三，空间分辨率为0.25°×0.25°，意味着每帧全球天气数据有1440×720个数值（即如果数据由深度神经网络处理，则为“像素”或“体素”）。正如我们稍后将看到的，高复杂性给NWP和基于AI方法的计算成本带来了严重问题。

items.en: Based on the above definition, a weather forecast system is described as a mathematical function f​(⋅)𝑓⋅f(\cdot) applied on 𝐀t∗superscriptsubscript𝐀𝑡∗\mathbf{A}_{t}^{\ast}. There are mainly two lines of research for weather forecast, which we follow the convention [8] to refer to them as NWP and AI-based methods.
items.zh: 基于上述定义，天气预报系统被描述为应用于A_t^*的数学函数f(·)。主要有两条天气预报研究路线，我们遵循惯例[8]将其称为NWP和基于AI的方法。

items.en: The first line is the conventional numerical weather prediction (NWP) methods that approximate f​(⋅)𝑓⋅f(\cdot) using simulation. Starting with initial weather states, a set of partial differential equations (PDEs) are established to simulate different physical processes such as thermodynamics equations, N-S equations, continuous equations, etc [1, 25, 26]. To solve the PDEs, the atmospheric states are partitioned into discrete grids. Intuitively, reducing the spacing of grids leads to a larger number of grids and a higher spatial resolution of weather forecast, and also increases the computational costs of simulation. Currently, the spatial resolution is highly limited by the power of supercomputers. To accelerate computation, more approximation approaches were introduced, including (i) interpolation, which first performs low-resolution simulation and then estimates in-grid weather states, and (ii) parameterization [27], which uses an approximate function to solve very complex weather processes – typical examples include the parameterization for cloud [28, 29, 30] and convection [31, 32].
items.zh: 第一条路线是传统的数值天气预报（NWP）方法，它使用模拟来近似f(·)。从初始天气状态开始，建立一组偏微分方程（PDE）来模拟不同的物理过程，如热力学方程、N-S方程、连续方程等[1, 25, 26]。为了求解PDE，大气状态被划分为离散网格。直观上，减小网格间距会导致网格数量增加和天气预报空间分辨率提高，同时也会增加模拟的计算成本。目前，空间分辨率受到超级计算机能力的极大限制。为了加速计算，引入了更多的近似方法，包括 (i) 插值，它首先进行低分辨率模拟，然后估计网格内的天气状态，以及 (ii) 参数化[27]，它使用近似函数来求解非常复杂的天气过程——典型例子包括云[28, 29, 30]和对流[31, 32]的参数化。

items.en: Prior to this work, NWP methods contribute overall the highest prediction accuracy, but they are still troubled by the super-linearly increasing computational overhead [1, 5], especially when the amount of observation data keeps growing and it is difficult to perform efficient parallelization for NWP methods [33]. The slowness of NWP not only weakens the timeliness of operational IFS systems (e.g., most such systems can only update prediction several times a day), but also restricts the number of ensemble members (i.e., a set of individual prediction results for ensemble), hence weakening the diversity and accuracy of probabilistic weather forecast. In addition, the formulae used by NWP methods inevitably introduce approximation and computational errors [34, 6] which can augment with either iteration or incomplete or inaccurate analysis data [35]. It thus brings major challenges to maintain NWP methods with a complex PDE system that takes more and more factors into consideration.
items.zh: 在这项工作之前，NWP方法总体上贡献了最高的预测精度，但它们仍然受到超线性增长的计算开销的困扰[1, 5]，特别是当观测数据量持续增长且难以对NWP方法进行高效并行化时[33]。NWP的缓慢不仅削弱了业务IFS系统的时效性（例如，大多数此类系统每天只能更新几次预报），而且限制了集合成员的数量（即用于集合的一组单独预测结果），从而削弱了概率天气预报的多样性和准确性。此外，NWP方法使用的公式不可避免地引入近似和计算误差[34, 6]，这些误差可能随着迭代或不完整或不准确的分析数据而增大[35]。因此，维护一个考虑越来越多因素的复杂PDE系统的NWP方法面临重大挑战。

items.en: To alleviate the above burden, researchers started the second line that investigates AI-based methods for weather forecast. The cutting edge technology of AI lies in deep learning [36], a branch of machine learning, assuming that the complex function (i.e., f​(⋅)𝑓⋅f(\cdot)) can be directly learned from abundant training data without knowing the actual physical procedure and/or formulae. Most often, f​(⋅)𝑓⋅f(\cdot) appears as a deep neural network which is often written as f​(⋅;𝜽)𝑓⋅𝜽f(\cdot;\boldsymbol{\theta}) where ⋅⋅\cdot is a placeholder for input data and 𝜽𝜽\boldsymbol{\theta} denotes the learnable parameters. The network often contains a number of layers. Each of these layers has a large amount of learnable parameters, and these parameters are initialized as white noise and optimized by back-propagating prediction errors of the deep network. The most similar field to weather forecast is computer vision (CV) where image data appears in 2D/3D cubes. In the past decade, the CV community developed many effective network architectures (e.g., [37, 38], etc.), and recently, they transplanted a kind of powerful architectures named transformers from natural language processing [39] and developed the variants [40, 41] that are capable of dealing with image data.
items.zh: 为了减轻上述负担，研究人员开始了第二条路线，即研究基于AI的天气预报方法。AI的前沿技术在于深度学习[36]，这是机器学习的一个分支，假设复杂函数（即f(·)）可以直接从丰富的训练数据中学习，而无需了解实际的物理过程和/或公式。大多数情况下，f(·)表现为一个深度神经网络，通常写为f(·;θ)，其中·是输入数据的占位符，θ表示可学习参数。该网络通常包含多个层。每一层都有大量可学习参数，这些参数初始化为白噪声，并通过反向传播深度网络的预测误差进行优化。与天气预报最相似的领域是计算机视觉（CV），其中图像数据以2D/3D立方体形式出现。在过去十年中，CV社区开发了许多有效的网络架构（例如[37, 38]等），并且最近，他们将一种名为Transformer的强大架构从自然语言处理[39]移植过来，并开发了能够处理图像数据的变体[40, 41]。

items.en: In the scope of weather forecast, AI-based methods were first applied in the scenarios where it is difficult to predict future weather data using the NWP methods, e.g., precipitation forecasting based on radar data [42, 43, 44, 45] or satellite data [46, 47]. The powerful expressive ability of deep neural networks led to the success in these data-driven environments, which further encouraged researchers to delve into the scenarios that the NWP methods are troubled by enormous computational overhead, e.g., direct medium-range weather forecast [10, 13, 14, 15, 12] that consumed most of the computational resources of weather forecast centers in the past decade.
items.zh: 在天气预报领域，基于AI的方法首先应用于难以使用NWP方法预测未来天气数据的场景，例如基于雷达数据[42, 43, 44, 45]或卫星数据[46, 47]的降水预报。深度神经网络的强大表达能力导致了这些数据驱动环境的成功，这进一步鼓励研究人员深入研究NWP方法受巨大计算开销困扰的场景，例如直接中期天气预报[10, 13, 14, 15, 12]，这在过去十年中消耗了天气预报中心的大部分计算资源。

items.en: This paper investigates medium-range weather forecast. NWP and AI-based methods have been competing in this scenario, where NWP methods led in forecast accuracy [8] and resolution, while AI-based methods showed their advantages in efficiency (e.g., the inference speed is orders of magnitude faster than the NWP methods [14, 8]). Prior to 2022, AI-based methods cannot achieve the horizontal resolution of 0.25∘×0.25∘superscript0.25superscript0.250.25^{\circ}\times 0.25^{\circ} as NWP methods can. Recently, FourCastNet [14] improved the resolution to 0.25∘×0.25∘superscript0.25superscript0.250.25^{\circ}\times 0.25^{\circ}, but the forecast accuracy (e.g., in terms of RMSE or ACC), is still inferior to operational IFS even after a large-member ensemble was performed. The disadvantages in forecast accuracy and interpretability, especially in extreme weather events, hinder the applications of AI-based methods. Consequently, AI-based methods mostly play the role of fast surrogate models for medium-range weather forecast.
items.zh: 本文研究中程天气预报。数值天气预报（NWP）和基于人工智能的方法在这一场景中相互竞争，其中NWP方法在预报精度[8]和分辨率上领先，而基于AI的方法在效率上显示出优势（例如，推理速度比NWP方法快数个数量级[14, 8]）。在2022年之前，基于AI的方法无法达到NWP方法所能实现的0.25°×0.25°水平分辨率。最近，FourCastNet[14]将分辨率提升至0.25°×0.25°，但即使进行了大集合预报，其预报精度（例如，以均方根误差或异常相关系数衡量）仍低于业务化IFS。预报精度和可解释性方面的劣势，尤其是在极端天气事件中，阻碍了基于AI方法的应用。因此，基于AI的方法主要扮演中程天气预报的快速替代模型角色。

items.en: We briefly analyze the reasons why AI-based (specifically, deep learning based) methods fell behind NWP methods in terms of prediction accuracy. There are mainly two aspects, summarized as follows.
items.zh: 我们简要分析基于AI（特别是基于深度学习）方法在预测精度上落后于NWP方法的原因。主要有两个方面，总结如下。

items.en: First, weather forecast shall take high-dimensional (e.g., 3D spatial with 1D time), anisotropic data into consideration, yet existing AI-based methods [10, 13, 12, 15, 14] often worked on 2D (latitude and longitude) data. This brings two-fold disadvantages. On the one hand, the spacing and distribution of atmospheric states and the relationship between atmospheric patches change rapidly across pressure levels, making it difficult for 2D models to adapt to different situations. On the other hand, many weather processes (e.g., radiation, convection, etc.) can only be completely formulated in the 3D space, and thus 2D models cannot make use of such important patterns.
items.zh: 首先，天气预报需要考虑高维（例如，三维空间加一维时间）、各向异性的数据，而现有的基于AI的方法[10, 13, 12, 15, 14]通常处理二维（纬度和经度）数据。这带来了两方面的劣势。一方面，大气状态的空间分布和间隔以及大气块之间的关系在不同气压层上变化迅速，使得二维模型难以适应不同情况。另一方面，许多天气过程（例如，辐射、对流等）只能在三维空间中完整表述，因此二维模型无法利用这些重要模式。

items.en: Second, medium-range weather forecast can suffer from cumulative forecast errors when the model is called too many times. As an example, FourCastNet [14] trained a base model for 666-hour forecast, so that performing a 777-day forecast required executing the model 282828 times iteratively. Compared to the case in NWP methods, such errors can grow rapidly because AI-based methods often do not consider real-world constraints (e.g., formulated by the PDEs). According to the results in FourCastNet, the forecast error often grows super-linearly with time. Note that FourCastNet applied a specialized method for reducing iteration error, but the actual gain is somewhat limited.
items.zh: 其次，中程天气预报在模型被调用次数过多时可能遭受累积预报误差。例如，FourCastNet[14]训练了一个用于6小时预报的基础模型，因此执行7天预报需要迭代运行模型28次。与NWP方法的情况相比，这种误差可能迅速增长，因为基于AI的方法通常不考虑现实世界的约束（例如，由偏微分方程表述的）。根据FourCastNet的结果，预报误差通常随时间超线性增长。注意，FourCastNet应用了一种专门方法减少迭代误差，但实际收益有限。

items.en: Summarizing the above factors, we come up with the insights that one shall try to increase the dimensionality of data and reduce the number of iterations for more accurate medium-range weather forecast. However, this encounters difficulties in computational overhead because the weather data is very large (see Section 2.1). In the next part, we will elaborate a method built upon a tradeoff between accuracy and efficiency – in brief, we use 3D (latitude, longitude, and height) data as input and output, and train a few individual models for different prediction time gaps to maximally reduce the maximum number of iterations called for medium-range forecast.
items.zh: 总结上述因素，我们得出见解：应尝试增加数据维度并减少迭代次数，以实现更准确的中程天气预报。然而，这在计算开销上遇到困难，因为天气数据非常庞大（见第2.1节）。在下一部分，我们将详细阐述一种建立在精度与效率权衡基础上的方法——简而言之，我们使用三维（纬度、经度和高度）数据作为输入和输出，并训练几个独立的模型用于不同的预测时间间隔，以最大程度减少中程预报所需的最大迭代次数。

items.capEn: Figure 2: An overview of the 3D Earth-specific transformer (3DEST). Based on the standard encode-decoder design, we (i) adjust the shifted-window mechanism and (ii) apply an Earth-specific positional bias – see the main texts for details.
items.capZh: 图2：三维地球特定Transformer（3DEST）概述。基于标准的编码器-解码器设计，我们（i）调整了移位窗口机制，并（ii）应用了地球特定位置偏置——详见正文。

items.en: Based on the above insights, we present our system, termed Pangu-Weather, for fast and accurate global weather forecast. As an AI-based method, it surpasses the accuracy of conventional NWP methods for the first time, meanwhile enjoying a very fast inference speed.
items.zh: 基于上述见解，我们提出我们的系统，称为盘古天气，用于快速准确的全球天气预报。作为一种基于AI的方法，它首次超越了传统NWP方法的精度，同时享有非常快的推理速度。

items.en: The core part of Pangu-Weather is a set of deep neural networks trained on 393939 years of global weather data – we elaborate data preparation and the pre-training task in Section 3.2. The key to reduce the accuracy loss is two-fold, namely (i) using a 3D Earth-specific transformer (3DEST) to model the 3D atmosphere effectively – see Section 3.3, and (ii) applying a hierarchical temporal aggregation strategy (i.e., training a few models with various lead times) to alleviate cumulative forecast errors – see Section 3.4. The Pangu-Weather system can be applied to generic or specific forecast scenarios, as we shall see in Section 4.
items.zh: 盘古天气的核心部分是一组在39年全球天气数据上训练的深度神经网络——我们在第3.2节中详细说明数据准备和预训练任务。减少精度损失的关键有两方面，即（i）使用三维地球特定Transformer（3DEST）有效建模三维大气——见第3.3节，以及（ii）应用分层时间聚合策略（即，训练几个具有不同提前时间的模型）以减轻累积预报误差——见第3.4节。盘古天气系统可应用于通用或特定预报场景，我们将在第4节中看到。

full.sec: 3.2 Data Preparation and the Pre-training Task
full.secZh: 3.2 数据准备与预训练任务

items.en: We download the ERA5 dataset [24, 48, 49] from the official website222https://cds.climate.copernicus.eu/ offered by Copernicus Climate Data (CDS). for training and evaluating Pangu-Weather. It contains global, hourly reanalysis data for the past 606060 years. The observation data and the prediction of numerical models are blended into reanalysis data using numerical assimilation methods, providing a high-quality benchmark for global weather forecast. Following the existing methods [10, 14, 13], we train our models on a subset of ERA5 – in particular, we use the 1979–2017 (393939 years of) data for training, the 2019 data for validation, and the 2018, 2020, 2021 data for testing.
items.zh: 我们从哥白尼气候数据服务（CDS）提供的官方网站下载ERA5数据集[24, 48, 49]，用于训练和评估盘古天气。它包含过去60年的全球逐小时再分析数据。观测数据和数值模型的预测通过数值同化方法融合到再分析数据中，为全球天气预报提供了高质量基准。遵循现有方法[10, 14, 13]，我们在ERA5的子集上训练模型——具体而言，我们使用1979-2017年（39年）的数据进行训练，2019年数据进行验证，2018年、2020年、2021年数据进行测试。

items.en: We make use of observation data of every single hour so that the algorithm can perform hourly prediction. We keep the highest spatial resolution available in ERA5, namely, 0.25∘×0.25∘superscript0.25superscript0.250.25^{\circ}\times 0.25^{\circ} on Earth’s sphere, resulting in an input resolution of 1440×72114407211440\times 721 (144014401440 for longitude and 721721721 for latitude – note that the northmost and southmost data do not overlap). The largest difference between our method and the prior works lies in that we formulate height information (represented as pressure levels) into the 3rd spatial dimension. To reduce computational costs, we follow [10] to choose 131313 pressure levels (i.e., 50​h​P​a50hPa50\mathrm{hPa}, 100​h​P​a100hPa100\mathrm{hPa}, 150​h​P​a150hPa150\mathrm{hPa}, 200​h​P​a200hPa200\mathrm{hPa}, 250​h​P​a250hPa250\mathrm{hPa}, 300​h​P​a300hPa300\mathrm{hPa}, 400​h​P​a400hPa400\mathrm{hPa}, 500​h​P​a500hPa500\mathrm{hPa}, 600​h​P​a600hPa600\mathrm{hPa}, 700​h​P​a700hPa700\mathrm{hPa}, 850​h​P​a850hPa850\mathrm{hPa}, 925​h​P​a925hPa925\mathrm{hPa}, and 1000​h​P​a1000hPa1000\mathrm{hPa}), from a total of 373737 levels, plus Earth’s surface. To fairly compare with the online version of ECMWF control forecast, we choose to predict the factors published in the TIGGE dataset [16], namely, five upper-air atmospheric variables (i.e., geopotential, specific humidity, temperature, u𝑢u-component and v𝑣v-component of wind speed) and four surface weather variables (i.e., 2​m2m2\mathrm{m} temperature, u𝑢u-component and v𝑣v-component 10​m10m10\mathrm{m} wind speed, and mean sea level pressure). In addition, three constant masks (i.e., the topography mask, land-sea mask and soil type mask) are added to the input of surface variables.
items.zh: 我们利用每小时的观测数据，以便算法能够进行逐小时预测。我们保持ERA5中可用的最高空间分辨率，即地球球面上的0.25°×0.25°，得到输入分辨率为1440×721（1440为经度，721为纬度——注意最北端和最南端数据不重叠）。我们的方法与先前工作的最大区别在于，我们将高度信息（以气压层表示）表述为第三空间维度。为降低计算成本，我们遵循[10]从总共37层中选择13个气压层（即50 hPa、100 hPa、150 hPa、200 hPa、250 hPa、300 hPa、400 hPa、500 hPa、600 hPa、700 hPa、850 hPa、925 hPa和1000 hPa），加上地球表面。为与ECMWF控制预报的在线版本公平比较，我们选择预测TIGGE数据集[16]中发布的要素，即五个高空大气变量（位势、比湿、温度、风速的u分量和v分量）和四个地面天气变量（2米温度、10米风速的u分量和v分量、平均海平面气压）。此外，三个常数掩码（即地形掩码、海陆掩码和土壤类型掩码）被添加到地面变量的输入中。

items.en: The pre-training task is straightforward, i.e., asking the model to predict the future weather given historical observation data. Technically, this involves sampling a time point t𝑡t (i.e., date and hour) from the dataset and specifying a prediction gap Δ​tΔ𝑡\Delta t, so that the model, f​(⋅;𝜽)𝑓⋅𝜽f(\cdot;\boldsymbol{\theta}), takes 𝐀t∗superscriptsubscript𝐀𝑡∗\mathbf{A}_{t}^{\ast} as input and predicts 𝐀^t+Δ​t∗superscriptsubscript^𝐀𝑡Δ𝑡∗\hat{\mathbf{A}}_{t+\Delta t}^{\ast}, with the goal of approaching 𝐀t+Δ​t∗superscriptsubscript𝐀𝑡Δ𝑡∗\mathbf{A}_{t+\Delta t}^{\ast}. In the context of deep learning, f​(⋅;𝜽)𝑓⋅𝜽f(\cdot;\boldsymbol{\theta}) appears as a differentiable function so that the difference between 𝐀t+Δ​t∗superscriptsubscript𝐀𝑡Δ𝑡∗\mathbf{A}_{t+\Delta t}^{\ast} and 𝐀^t+Δ​t∗superscriptsubscript^𝐀𝑡Δ𝑡∗\hat{\mathbf{A}}_{t+\Delta t}^{\ast} is computed and back-propagated to update the parameters, 𝜽𝜽\boldsymbol{\theta}. The technical details, including the design of f​(⋅;𝜽)𝑓⋅𝜽f(\cdot;\boldsymbol{\theta}) and the choice of Δ​tΔ𝑡\Delta t values, are to be elaborated in the following subsections.
items.zh: 预训练任务很简单，即要求模型根据历史观测数据预测未来天气。技术上，这涉及从数据集中采样一个时间点t（即日期和小时）并指定一个预测间隔Δt，使得模型f(·;θ)以A_t*为输入，预测A_{t+Δt}^*，目标是接近A_{t+Δt}^*。在深度学习背景下，f(·;θ)表现为一个可微函数，因此计算A_{t+Δt}^*与A_{t+Δt}^*之间的差异，并反向传播以更新参数θ。技术细节，包括f(·;θ)的设计和Δt值的选择，将在以下小节中详细说明。

items.en: This part describes the design of f​(⋅,𝜽)𝑓⋅𝜽f(\cdot,\boldsymbol{\theta}). We name it as a 3D Earth-specific transformer (3DEST). The overall architecture of 3DEST is illustrated in Figure 2. It is a variant of vision transformer [40] with input and output being 3D weather states at a specified time point. For a single model, the lead time between input and output states is fixed, e.g., Δ​tΔ𝑡\Delta t equals to 666 hours. We achieve any-time weather forecast by aggregating multiple models with different lead times, as elaborated in the next subsection.
items.zh: 本部分描述f(·,θ)的设计。我们将其命名为三维地球特定Transformer（3DEST）。3DEST的整体架构如图2所示。它是视觉Transformer[40]的一个变体，输入和输出为指定时间点的三维天气状态。对于单个模型，输入和输出状态之间的提前时间是固定的，例如Δt等于6小时。我们通过聚合多个具有不同提前时间的模型来实现任意时间的天气预报，如下一小节所述。

items.en: There are two sources of input and output data, namely, upper-air variables and surface variables. The former involves 131313 pressure levels, and they combined offer a 13×1440×721×5131440721513\times 1440\times 721\times 5 data cube. The latter contains a 1440×721×4144072141440\times 721\times 4 cube. These parameters are first embedded from the original space into a C𝐶C-dimensional latent space. A common technique in computer vision named patch embedding is used for dimensionality reduction. For the upper-air part, the patch size is 2×4×42442\times 4\times 4, so that the embedded data has a shape of 7×360×181×C7360181𝐶7\times 360\times 181\times C. For the surface variables, the patch size is 4×4444\times 4, so that the embedded data has a shape of 360×181×C360181𝐶360\times 181\times C. These two data cubes are then concatenated along the first (height) dimension to yield a 8×360×181×C8360181𝐶8\times 360\times 181\times C cube. The cube is then propagated through a standard encoder-decoder architecture with 888 encoder layers and 888 decoder layers. The output of decoder is still a 8×360×181×C8360181𝐶8\times 360\times 181\times C cube, which is projected to the original space with patch recovery, producing the desired output. Below, we describe the technical details of each component.
items.zh: 输入和输出数据有两个来源，即高空变量和地面变量。前者涉及13个气压层，它们组合起来提供一个13×1440×721×5的数据立方体。后者包含一个1440×721×4的立方体。这些参数首先从原始空间嵌入到一个C维潜在空间。计算机视觉中一种常见技术称为块嵌入，用于降维。对于高空部分，块大小为2×4×4，因此嵌入数据的形状为7×360×181×C。对于地面变量，块大小为4×4，因此嵌入数据的形状为360×181×C。这两个数据立方体然后沿第一维（高度）拼接，产生一个8×360×181×C的立方体。该立方体然后通过一个标准的编码器-解码器架构传播，包含8个编码器层和8个解码器层。解码器的输出仍然是一个8×360×181×C的立方体，通过块恢复投影到原始空间，产生所需的输出。下面，我们描述每个组件的技术细节。

items.en: Patch embedding and patch recovery. We follow the standard vision transformer to use a linear layer with GeLU activation for this purpose. In our implementation, a patch has 2×4×42442\times 4\times 4 pixels for upper-air variables and 4×4444\times 4 for surface variables. The stride of sliding windows is the same as patch size, and necessary zero-value padding is added when the data size is indivisible by the patch size. The number of parameters for patch embedding is (4×4×2×5)×C4425𝐶(4\times 4\times 2\times 5)\times C for upper-air variables and (4×4×4)×C444𝐶(4\times 4\times 4)\times C for surface variables. Patch recovery performs the opposite operation, but it does not share parameters with patch embedding.
items.zh: 块嵌入和块恢复。我们遵循标准视觉Transformer，使用带有GeLU激活的线性层来实现此目的。在我们的实现中，高空变量的块大小为2×4×4像素，地面变量为4×4像素。滑动窗口的步长与块大小相同，当数据大小不能被块大小整除时，添加必要的零值填充。块嵌入的参数数量对于高空变量为(4×4×2×5)×C，对于地面变量为(4×4×4)×C。块恢复执行相反的操作，但不与块嵌入共享参数。

items.en: The encoder-decoder architecture. The data size remains unchanged (8×360×181×C8360181𝐶8\times 360\times 181\times C) for the first 222 encoder layers, while for the next 666 layers, the horizontal dimensions are reduced by a factor of 222 and the number of channels is doubled, resulting in a data size of 8×180×91×2​C8180912𝐶8\times 180\times 91\times 2C. The decoder part is symmetric to the encoder part, with the first 666 decoder layers sized 8×180×91×2​C8180912𝐶8\times 180\times 91\times 2C and the next 222 layers sized 8×360×181×C8360181𝐶8\times 360\times 181\times C. The outputs of the 2nd encoder layer and the 7th decoder layer are concatenated along the channel dimension. Down-sampling and up-sampling operations connect the adjacent layers of different resolutions, and we follow the implementation of Swin transformers [41]. For down-sampling, we merge four tokens into one (the feature dimensionality increases from C𝐶C to 4​C4𝐶4C) and perform a linear layer to reduce the dimensionality to 2​C2𝐶2C. For up-sampling, the reverse operations are performed.
items.zh: 编码器-解码器架构。前2个编码器层的数据大小保持不变（8×360×181×C），而对于接下来的6层，水平维度减少2倍，通道数加倍，得到数据大小为8×180×91×2C。解码器部分与编码器部分对称，前6个解码器层大小为8×180×91×2C，接下来的2层大小为8×360×181×C。第2个编码器层和第7个解码器层的输出沿通道维度拼接。下采样和上采样操作连接不同分辨率的相邻层，我们遵循Swin Transformer[41]的实现。对于下采样，我们将四个token合并为一个（特征维度从C增加到4C），并执行线性层将维度减少到2C。对于上采样，执行相反的操作。

items.capEn: Figure 3: The motivation of using an Earth-specific positional bias. Left: the horizontal map corresponds to an uneven spatial distribution on Earth’s sphere. Middle: the geopotential height is closely related to the latitude. Right: the mean wind speed and temperature are closely related to the height (formulated as pressure levels).
items.capZh: 图3：使用地球特定位置偏置的动机。左：水平地图对应地球球面上的不均匀空间分布。中：位势高度与纬度密切相关。右：平均风速和温度与高度（以气压层表示）密切相关。

items.en: 3D Earth-specific transformer blocks. Each encoder and decoder layer is a 3D Earth-specific transformer (3DEST) block. It is similar to the standard vision transformer block [40] but specifically designed to align with Earth’s geometry. To further reduce computational costs, we inherit the window-attention mechanism [41] to partition the feature maps (either 8×360×18183601818\times 360\times 181 or 8×180×918180918\times 180\times 91 – the last dimension is omitted) into windows, and each window contains up to 2×12×621262\times 12\times 6 tokens. The standard self-attention mechanism is applied within each window. The shifted-window attention mechanism is applied, so that for every layer, the grid partition differs from the previous one by half window size333Note that, along the longitude dimension, the leftmost and rightmost indices are actually close to each other. In the shifted-window mechanism, if half windows appear at both leftmost and rightmost positions, they are directly merged into one window.. We refer the reader to the original paper [41] for more details. The standard self-attention formula is written below:
items.zh: 三维地球特定Transformer块。每个编码器和解码器层都是一个三维地球特定Transformer（3DEST）块。它类似于标准视觉Transformer块[40]，但专门设计以符合地球几何形状。为进一步降低计算成本，我们继承窗口注意力机制[41]，将特征图（8×360×181或8×180×91——最后一维省略）划分为窗口，每个窗口最多包含2×12×6个token。在每个窗口内应用标准自注意力机制。应用移位窗口注意力机制，使得对于每一层，网格划分与前一层相差半个窗口大小。我们参考原始论文[41]了解更多细节。标准自注意力公式如下：

items.en: where 𝐐𝐐\mathbf{Q}, 𝐊𝐊\mathbf{K}, and 𝐕𝐕\mathbf{V} are the query, key, and value vectors produced by the transformer block, respectively, D𝐷D is the feature dimensionality of 𝐐𝐐\mathbf{Q} and 𝐊𝐊\mathbf{K} (i.e., C𝐶C or 2​C2𝐶2C), and 𝐁𝐁\mathbf{B} is the positional bias term.
items.zh: 其中Q、K和V分别是Transformer块产生的查询、键和值向量，D是Q和K的特征维度（即C或2C），B是位置偏置项。

items.en: Earth-specific positional bias. Swin transformer used a relative positional bias to represent the translation invariant component of attentions, where the bias is computed upon the relative coordinate of each window. For global weather forecast, however, the situation is a bit different. Each token corresponds to an absolute position on Earth’s coordinate system and, since the map is a projection of Earth’s sphere, the spacing between neighboring tokens can be different – see Figure 3. More importantly, some weather states are closely related to the absolute position. Examples of geopotential, wind speed, and temperature are shown in Figure 3. To capture these properties, we modify 𝐁𝐁\mathbf{B} into an Earth-specific positional bias, termed 𝐁ESPsubscript𝐁ESP\mathbf{B}_{\mathrm{ESP}}, adding a positional bias to each token based on its absolute (rather than relative) coordinate.
items.zh: 地球特定位置偏置。Swin Transformer使用相对位置偏置来表示注意力的平移不变分量，其中偏置基于每个窗口的相对坐标计算。然而，对于全球天气预报，情况略有不同。每个token对应地球坐标系上的绝对位置，并且由于地图是地球球面的投影，相邻token之间的间距可能不同——见图3。更重要的是，一些天气状态与绝对位置密切相关。图3展示了位势、风速和温度的示例。为捕捉这些特性，我们将B修改为地球特定位置偏置，称为B_ESP，基于每个token的绝对（而非相对）坐标添加位置偏置。

items.en: Mathematically, let the entire feature map have a spatial resolution of Npl×Nlat×Nlonsubscript𝑁plsubscript𝑁latsubscript𝑁lonN_{\mathrm{pl}}\times N_{\mathrm{lat}}\times N_{\mathrm{lon}} where Nplsubscript𝑁plN_{\mathrm{pl}}, Nlatsubscript𝑁latN_{\mathrm{lat}}, and Nlonsubscript𝑁lonN_{\mathrm{lon}} indicate the size along the axes of height (by pressure levels), latitude, and longitude, respectively. Swin transformer partitions these neurons into Mpl×Mlat×Mlonsubscript𝑀plsubscript𝑀latsubscript𝑀lonM_{\mathrm{pl}}\times M_{\mathrm{lat}}\times M_{\mathrm{lon}} windows, and each window has a size of Wpl×Wlat×Wlonsubscript𝑊plsubscript𝑊latsubscript𝑊lonW_{\mathrm{pl}}\times W_{\mathrm{lat}}\times W_{\mathrm{lon}}. The Earth-specific position bias matrix contains Mpl×Mlatsubscript𝑀plsubscript𝑀latM_{\mathrm{pl}}\times M_{\mathrm{lat}} sub-matrices (Mlonsubscript𝑀lonM_{\mathrm{lon}} does not appear because different longitudes share the same bias – the longitude indices are cyclic and spacing is evenly distributed along this axis), each of which contains Wpl2×Wlat2×(2​Wlon−1)superscriptsubscript𝑊pl2superscriptsubscript𝑊lat22subscript𝑊lon1W_{\mathrm{pl}}^{2}\times W_{\mathrm{lat}}^{2}\times(2W_{\mathrm{lon}}-1) learnable parameters. When the attention is computed between two units within the same window (Swin does not compute inter-window attentions), we use the window coordinate (mpl,mlat,mlon)subscript𝑚plsubscript𝑚latsubscript𝑚lon(m_{\mathrm{pl}},m_{\mathrm{lat}},m_{\mathrm{lon}}) to locate the corresponding bias sub-matrix (mlonsubscript𝑚lonm_{\mathrm{lon}} is not used), and then use the intra-window coordinates, (h1′,ϕ1′,λ1′)subscriptsuperscriptℎ′1subscriptsuperscriptitalic-ϕ′1subscriptsuperscript𝜆′1(h^{\prime}_{1},\phi^{\prime}_{1},\lambda^{\prime}_{1}) and (h2′,ϕ2′,λ2′)subscriptsuperscriptℎ′2subscriptsuperscriptitalic-ϕ′2subscriptsuperscript𝜆′2(h^{\prime}_{2},\phi^{\prime}_{2},\lambda^{\prime}_{2}), to call for the bias value at (h1′+h2′×Wpl,ϕ1′+ϕ2′×Wlat,λ1′−λ2′+Wlon−1)subscriptsuperscriptℎ′1subscriptsuperscriptℎ′2subscript𝑊plsubscriptsuperscriptitalic-ϕ′1subscriptsuperscriptitalic-ϕ′2subscript𝑊latsubscriptsuperscript𝜆′1subscriptsuperscript𝜆′2subscript𝑊lon1(h^{\prime}_{1}+h^{\prime}_{2}\times W_{\mathrm{pl}},\phi^{\prime}_{1}+\phi^{\prime}_{2}\times W_{\mathrm{lat}},\lambda^{\prime}_{1}-\lambda^{\prime}_{2}+W_{\mathrm{lon}}-1) of the sub-matrix.
items.zh: 数学上，设整个特征图的空间分辨率为N_pl×N_lat×N_lon，其中N_pl、N_lat和N_lon分别表示沿高度（按气压层）、纬度和经度轴的大小。Swin Transformer将这些神经元划分为M_pl×M_lat×M_lon个窗口，每个窗口大小为W_pl×W_lat×W_lon。地球特定位置偏置矩阵包含M_pl×M_lat个子矩阵（M_lon不出现，因为不同经度共享相同的偏置——经度索引是循环的，且沿该轴间距均匀分布），每个子矩阵包含W_pl²×W_lat²×(2W_lon-1)个可学习参数。当计算同一窗口内两个单元之间的注意力时（Swin不计算窗口间注意力），我们使用窗口坐标(m_pl, m_lat, m_lon)定位相应的偏置子矩阵（m_lon不使用），然后使用窗口内坐标(h'_1, φ'_1, λ'_1)和(h'_2, φ'_2, λ'_2)调用子矩阵中位置(h'_1 + h'_2×W_pl, φ'_1 + φ'_2×W_lat, λ'_1 - λ'_2 + W_lon - 1)处的偏置值。

items.en: Applying the Earth-specific positional bias brings two-fold differences. First, it enables a better formulation of Earth’s atmosphere: In every attention block, the Earth-specific positional bias learns different spatial relationship between tokens for different latitudes and heights, hence correcting the non-uniformity brought by the uneven spatial distribution. Second, compared to the original version where all grids share the same bias, the number of learnable parameters of each transformer layer is largely increased from (2​Wpl−1)×2​(Wlat−1)×(2​Wlon−1)2subscript𝑊pl12subscript𝑊lat12subscript𝑊lon1(2W_{\mathrm{pl}}-1)\times 2(W_{\mathrm{lat}}-1)\times(2W_{\mathrm{lon}}-1) to Mpl×Mlat×Wpl2×Wlat2×(2​Wlon−1)subscript𝑀plsubscript𝑀latsuperscriptsubscript𝑊pl2superscriptsubscript𝑊lat22subscript𝑊lon1M_{\mathrm{pl}}\times M_{\mathrm{lat}}\times W_{\mathrm{pl}}^{2}\times W_{\mathrm{lat}}^{2}\times(2W_{\mathrm{lon}}-1). In the first block, the latter quantity is about 527×527\times larger than the former one. The huge amount of bias parameters allows each block to flexibly learn specific patterns for each variable, such as the relationship shown in Figure 3. In practice, we do not observe any difficulties in optimizing the large amount of parameters. Instead, the model converges faster in the training process since useful priors have been introduced. In addition, the Earth-specific positional bias does not increase the FLOPs of the model.
items.zh: 应用地球特定位置偏置带来了两方面的差异。首先，它能够更好地描述地球大气：在每个注意力块中，地球特定位置偏置学习不同纬度和高度上词元之间的不同空间关系，从而修正由不均匀空间分布带来的非均匀性。其次，与所有网格共享相同偏置的原始版本相比，每个Transformer层的可学习参数数量从(2Wpl−1)×2(Wlat−1)×(2Wlon−1)大幅增加到Mpl×Mlat×Wpl^2×Wlat^2×(2Wlon−1)。在第一个块中，后者比前者大约大527倍。大量的偏置参数使得每个块能够灵活地学习每个变量的特定模式，例如图3所示的关系。在实践中，我们没有观察到优化大量参数存在任何困难。相反，由于引入了有用的先验知识，模型在训练过程中收敛更快。此外，地球特定位置偏置不会增加模型的FLOPs。

items.en: Design choices. We briefly discuss other design choices. Due to the large computational overhead, we do not perform exhaustive ablative or diagnostic studies on the hyper-parameters and we believe there exist configurations that lead to higher accuracy. First, we use 888 (2+6262+6) encoder and decoder layers, which is significantly fewer than the standard Swin transformer. This is to reduce the complexity in both time and memory. If one has a larger GPU memory and a more powerful cluster, increasing the network depth can lead to higher accuracy. Second, it is possible to reduce the number of parameters used in the Earth-specific positional bias by parameter sharing or other techniques. However, we do not consider it as a key issue, because it is unlikely to deploy the weather forecast model to edge device with limited storage. Third, it is possible and promising to feed the weather states of more time points into the model, which changes all tensors from 3D to 4D. While we believe such a modification can lead to accuracy gain, the limited computational budget prevents us from this trial.
items.zh: 设计选择。我们简要讨论其他设计选择。由于计算开销较大，我们没有对超参数进行详尽的消融或诊断研究，并且我们相信存在能够带来更高准确率的配置。首先，我们使用了8个（2+6）编码器和解码器层，这比标准的Swin Transformer少得多。这是为了降低时间和内存的复杂度。如果拥有更大的GPU内存和更强大的集群，增加网络深度可以带来更高的准确率。其次，可以通过参数共享或其他技术减少地球特定位置偏置中使用的参数数量。然而，我们不认为这是一个关键问题，因为不太可能将天气预报模型部署到存储有限的边缘设备上。第三，将更多时间点的天气状态输入模型是可能且有前景的，这会将所有张量从3D变为4D。虽然我们相信这样的修改可以带来准确率提升，但有限的计算预算阻止了我们进行这一尝试。

items.en: When the goal is to make medium-range weather forecast (e.g., the forecast time is up to 555 days) yet the lead time of the basic forecast model is relatively short (e.g., FourCastNet trained a model with a lead time of 666 hours), the system must execute the model many times iteratively, and the cumulative forecast errors can grow continuously. As shown in Figure 4, we mimic FourCastNet [14] to execute the 666-hour model 282828 times to achieve up to 777-day forecast, and we find that the forecast accuracy rapidly goes down as iteration goes on. Not surprisingly, the forecast accuracy drop becomes dramatic if the basic lead time is set to be 111 hour (i.e., the model is executed 168168168 times), yet the drop is largely alleviated if the lead time is 242424 hours (i.e., executed 777 times). This implies that, for medium-range and even long-range forecast, the system can benefit much from suppressing the cumulative forecast errors.
items.zh: 当目标是进行中期天气预报（例如，预报时间长达5天）而基础预报模型的提前时间相对较短（例如，FourCastNet训练了一个提前时间为6小时的模型）时，系统必须多次迭代执行模型，累积预报误差会持续增长。如图4所示，我们模仿FourCastNet [14] 将6小时模型执行28次以实现长达7天的预报，我们发现预报准确率随着迭代的进行迅速下降。毫不奇怪，如果基础提前时间设为1小时（即模型执行168次），预报准确率下降变得剧烈，但如果提前时间为24小时（即执行7次），下降则大大缓解。这意味着，对于中期甚至长期预报，系统可以从抑制累积预报误差中获益良多。

items.capEn: Figure 4: The curves showing cumulative forecast errors when one performs up to 777-day forecast with the base lead time being 111 hour, 333 hour, 666 hours, and 242424 hours, respectively. The statistics are performed in the March 2018 subset.
items.capZh: 图4：当分别以1小时、3小时、6小时和24小时的基础提前时间进行长达7天的预报时，累积预报误差的曲线。统计数据基于2018年3月的子集。

items.en: For this purpose, we exploit a straightforward yet effective strategy named hierarchical temporal aggregation. We train four individual models for 111-hour, 333-hour, 666-hour, and 242424-hour prediction, respectively. We do not continue enlarging the lead time, because it largely increases the difficulty of training the base model444We find that, based on the current deep network, it is difficult to perform long-term (say, 282828-day) forecast. We conjecture that, if more powerful methods are used (e.g., using time-aware inputs, increasing the computational complexity, etc.), the model may gain such abilities.. At the testing stage, given a forecast goal, we use the greedy algorithm to guarantee the minimal number of iterations. For example, for 777-day forecast, we execute 242424-hour forecast 777 times, while for a 232323-hour forecast, we execute 666-hour forecast 333 times, followed by 333-hour forecast 111 time and 111-hour forecast 222 times.
items.zh: 为此，我们采用了一种简单而有效的策略，称为层次时间聚合。我们分别训练了四个独立的模型，用于1小时、3小时、6小时和24小时的预测。我们没有继续增大提前时间，因为这大大增加了基础模型训练的难度。在测试阶段，给定一个预报目标，我们使用贪心算法保证最少的迭代次数。例如，对于7天预报，我们执行24小时预报7次；而对于23小时预报，我们执行6小时预报3次，接着执行3小时预报1次和1小时预报2次。

items.en: We point out that hierarchical temporal aggregation makes both the training and testing stages more efficient. For training, it avoids performing recursive optimization as many existing works [11, 12, 14] did, e.g., FourCastNet [14] computed both f​(𝐀)𝑓𝐀f(\mathbf{A}) and f​(f​(𝐀))𝑓𝑓𝐀f(f(\mathbf{A})) and produced two loss terms – although the iterative errors are indeed suppressed, it requires 2×2\times GPU memory for the same model and thus reduced the model size which is one of the critical factors of improvement. In addition, it avoids training a recursive neural network which may be unstable. For testing, especially when the forecast range is large, it reduces the number of forecasts as well as the time complexity.
items.zh: 我们指出，层次时间聚合使得训练和测试阶段都更加高效。对于训练，它避免了像许多现有工作那样进行递归优化，例如FourCastNet [14] 同时计算f(A)和f(f(A))并产生两个损失项——尽管迭代误差确实被抑制了，但它需要2倍的GPU内存用于同一模型，从而减小了模型大小，而模型大小是改进的关键因素之一。此外，它避免了训练可能不稳定的递归神经网络。对于测试，特别是当预报范围很大时，它减少了预报次数以及时间复杂度。

items.en: The four individual models are trained for 100100100 epochs using the Adam optimizer. Each full training procedure takes 161616 days on 192192192 NVIDIA Tesla-V100 GPUs. We find that all models have not yet arrived at full convergence at the end of 100100100 epochs, but the limited computational budget prevents us from continuing the training procedure. A weight decay of 3×10−63superscript1063\times 10^{-6} and a scheduled DropPath with a drop ratio of 0.20.20.2 are adopted to avoid over-fitting.
items.zh: 这四个独立模型使用Adam优化器训练了100个epoch。每个完整的训练过程在192块NVIDIA Tesla-V100 GPU上需要16天。我们发现所有模型在100个epoch结束时尚未完全收敛，但有限的计算预算阻止了我们继续训练过程。采用3×10^{-6}的权重衰减和丢弃率为0.2的调度DropPath以避免过拟合。

items.en: We report the forecast results of Pangu-Weather on two datasets. The first one is the held-out part of ERA5 for an overall evaluation of global, deterministic weather forecast. The second one is the 4th version of International Best Track Archive for Climate Stewardship (IBTrACS) dataset for evaluating the ability at tracking tropical cyclones, a special case of extreme weather forecast.
items.zh: 我们在两个数据集上报告了盘古天气的预报结果。第一个是ERA5的保留部分，用于全球确定性天气预报的整体评估。第二个是国际最佳热带气旋管理气候管理档案（IBTrACS）第4版数据集，用于评估追踪热带气旋的能力，这是极端天气预报的一个特例。

items.en: We compare Pangu-Weather to the strongest methods in both worlds of NWP and AI, namely, operational IFS offered by ECMWF (downloaded from the TIGGE archive [16])555We failed to download part of forecast results of the surface variables from TIGGE, due to the unavailability of ECMWF’s Data Handling Systems from September to November, so we compare our results to operational IFS by (i) fetching the numbers reported in WeatherBench [10] and (ii) extracting the quantities from the plots in the FourCastNet paper [14]. and FourCastNet [14]. For tropical cyclones tracking, we also download ECMWF-HRES forecast as a stronger competitor against Pangu-Weather in IBTrACS. To the best of our knowledge, no prior AI-based methods have ever reported quantitative results for tropical cyclones tracking.
items.zh: 我们将盘古天气与数值天气预报和人工智能领域中最强的方法进行比较，即ECMWF提供的业务IFS（从TIGGE档案下载）和FourCastNet [14]。对于热带气旋追踪，我们还下载了ECMWF-HRES预报作为盘古天气在IBTrACS上的更强竞争对手。据我们所知，之前没有基于人工智能的方法报告过热带气旋追踪的定量结果。

items.capEn: Figure 5: The comparison of forecast accuracy in terms of latitude-weighted RMSE (lower is better) and ACC (higher is better) of four upper-air variables at the pressure level of 500​h​P​a500hPa500\mathrm{hPa}. Here, T, Q, U and V stand for temperature, specific humidity, u𝑢u-component and v𝑣v-component of wind speed, respectively.
items.capZh: 图5：在500 hPa气压层上，四个高空变量的纬度加权RMSE（越低越好）和ACC（越高越好）的预报准确率比较。其中，T、Q、U和V分别代表温度、比湿、风速的u分量和v分量。

items.en: The deterministic forecast of Pangu-Weather is performed on the unperturbed initial states from ERA5. The forecast resolution of Pangu-Weather is determined by the training data (i.e., ERA5), where the spatial resolution is 0.25∘×0.25∘superscript0.25superscript0.250.25^{\circ}\times 0.25^{\circ}, comparable to the control forecast of ECMWF ENS product [3] and same as FourCastNet [14], yet the spacing of forecast (the minimal forecast time) is 111 hour (i.e., Pangu-Weather can provide hour-by-hour forecast), 6×6\times smaller than that of FourCastNet [14].
items.zh: 盘古天气的确定性预报是在ERA5未扰动的初始状态上进行的。盘古天气的预报分辨率由训练数据（即ERA5）决定，空间分辨率为0.25°×0.25°，与ECMWF ENS产品的控制预报相当，且与FourCastNet [14]相同，但预报间隔（最小预报时间）为1小时，比FourCastNet [14]小6倍。

items.en: Following the prior AI-based methods, the accuracy of deterministic forecast is computed by two quantitative metrics, namely, the latitude-weighted Root Mean Square Error (RMSE) and latitude-weighted Anomaly Correlation Coefficient (ACC). For a specified time point t𝑡t, the RMSE and ACC of any variable v𝑣v (e.g., 2m temperature or 500​h​P​a500hPa500\mathrm{hPa} geopotential) are defined as follows:
items.zh: 遵循先前基于人工智能的方法，确定性预报的准确率通过两个定量指标计算，即纬度加权均方根误差（RMSE）和纬度加权异常相关系数（ACC）。对于指定时间点t，任何变量v（例如2米温度或500 hPa位势）的RMSE和ACC定义如下：

items.en: where L​(i)=Nlat×cos⁡ϕi∑i′=1Nlatcos⁡ϕi′𝐿𝑖subscript𝑁latsubscriptitalic-ϕ𝑖superscriptsubscriptsuperscript𝑖′1subscript𝑁latsubscriptitalic-ϕsuperscript𝑖′L(i)=N_{\mathrm{lat}}\times\frac{\cos\phi_{i}}{\sum_{i^{\prime}=1}^{N_{\mathrm{lat}}}{\cos\phi_{i^{\prime}}}} stands for the weight at latitude ϕisubscriptitalic-ϕ𝑖\phi_{i} and 𝐀′superscript𝐀′\mathbf{A}^{\prime} denotes the difference between 𝐀𝐀\mathbf{A} and the climatology (i.e., long-term mean of weather states, which is estimated on the training data over 393939 years). Note that we omitted the range of summation in Eqn (3) for simplicity. In what follows, we report these two metrics on upper-air atmospheric variables and surface weather variables to show the superiority of Pangu-Weather. We also provide extensive visualization and diagnostic results for qualitative studies.
items.zh: 其中L(i)=Nlat×cosφi/∑_{i'=1}^{Nlat}cosφ_{i'}表示纬度φi处的权重，A'表示A与气候学（即天气状态的长期平均值，在39年的训练数据上估计）的差异。注意，为简单起见，我们在公式(3)中省略了求和范围。接下来，我们报告高空大气变量和地表天气变量的这两个指标，以显示盘古天气的优越性。我们还提供了大量的可视化和诊断结果用于定性研究。

items.capEn: Figure 6: The comparison of forecast accuracy in terms of latitude-weighted RMSE (lower is the better) and ACC (higher is the better) of three surface variables. Here, T2M, U10, V10 stand for 2m temperature, u𝑢u-component and v𝑣v-component of 10m wind speed, respectively.
items.capZh: 图6：三个地表变量的纬度加权RMSE（越低越好）和ACC（越高越好）的预报准确率比较。其中，T2M、U10、V10分别代表2米温度、10米风速的u分量和v分量。

items.en: As in the training procedure (see Section 3.2 for data preparation), Pangu-Weather forecasts five important upper-air variables (i.e., geopotential, specific humidity, temperature, u𝑢u-component and v𝑣v-component of wind speed) at 131313 pressure levels (i.e., 50​h​P​a50hPa50\mathrm{hPa}, 100​h​P​a100hPa100\mathrm{hPa}, 150​h​P​a150hPa150\mathrm{hPa}, 200​h​P​a200hPa200\mathrm{hPa}, 250​h​P​a250hPa250\mathrm{hPa}, 300​h​P​a300hPa300\mathrm{hPa}, 400​h​P​a400hPa400\mathrm{hPa}, 500​h​P​a500hPa500\mathrm{hPa}, 600​h​P​a600hPa600\mathrm{hPa}, 700​h​P​a700hPa700\mathrm{hPa}, 850​h​P​a850hPa850\mathrm{hPa}, 925​h​P​a925hPa925\mathrm{hPa}, and 1000​h​P​a1000hPa1000\mathrm{hPa}), with a spatial resolution of 0.25∘×0.25∘superscript0.25superscript0.250.25^{\circ}\times 0.25^{\circ}. This is to maximally ease the comparison to operational IFS [16] and FourCastNet [14], the best NWP and AI-based methods.
items.zh: 与训练过程（见第3.2节数据准备）一样，盘古天气在13个气压层（即50 hPa、100 hPa、150 hPa、200 hPa、250 hPa、300 hPa、400 hPa、500 hPa、600 hPa、700 hPa、850 hPa、925 hPa和1000 hPa）上预报五个重要的高空变量（即位势、比湿、温度、风速的u分量和v分量），空间分辨率为0.25°×0.25°。这是为了最大限度地便于与业务IFS [16]和FourCastNet [14]（最好的数值天气预报和基于人工智能的方法）进行比较。

items.en: The testing environment is established on the weather data in 2018666We also test our system in the 2020 and 2021 data, while we cannot provide comparative results since no prior works have reported results on these data. The property of forecast results is mostly similar to that observed in the 2018 data.. Following the protocol of operational IFS, we choose 222 time points (00:00 UTC and 12:00 UTC) each day as the initial time777The test points on Jan 1st, 2018 are excluded due to the overlap with training data. All test points in December 2018 are unavailable due to a server error of ECMWF. In addition, for the T850 variable, all test points in October 2018 are not used due to an unexpected error of data download from the TIGGE archive. and produce hourly forecast for the upcoming week, namely, forecast time being 1​h,2​h,…,168​h=7​d1h2h…168h7d1\mathrm{h},2\mathrm{h},\ldots,168\mathrm{h}=7\mathrm{d}. Quantitative comparisons are mainly made between Pangu-Weather and operational IFS, while the comparisons against other AI-based methods (e.g., [10, 11, 12, 15, 14, 13]) are incomplete due to the difference in spatial resolutions, test subsets, post-processing methods, etc. Note that all prior AI-based methods reported inferior forecast accuracy compared to operational IFS, while our method significantly outperforms operational IFS, claiming clear advantages over these candidates. For two specific variables, Z500 and T850, we directly compare Pangu-Weather against FourCastNet by fetching the numerical values from the plots in the paper – this introduces some errors which are negligible compared to the accuracy gap between Pangu-Weather and FourCastNet.
items.zh: 测试环境建立在2018年的天气数据上。遵循业务IFS的协议，我们每天选择2个时间点（00:00 UTC和12:00 UTC）作为初始时间，并为接下来的一周生成逐小时预报，即预报时间为1小时、2小时、…、168小时=7天。主要进行盘古天气与业务IFS之间的定量比较，而与其他基于人工智能的方法的比较由于空间分辨率、测试子集、后处理方法等差异而不完整。注意，所有先前基于人工智能的方法报告的预报准确率均低于业务IFS，而我们的方法显著优于业务IFS，声称对这些候选方法具有明显优势。对于两个特定变量Z500和T850，我们通过从论文的图中获取数值来直接比较盘古天气与FourCastNet——这引入了一些误差，但与盘古天气和FourCastNet之间的准确率差距相比可以忽略。

items.capEn: Figure 7: Visualization of 333-day weather forecast produced by Pangu-Weather (top), operational IFS (middle), and the ERA5 ground-truth (bottom). The left and right columns show the maps of 500​h​P​a500hPa500\mathrm{hPa} geopotential (Z500) and 850​h​P​a850hPa850\mathrm{hPa} temperature (T850), respectively. The input time point (i.e. the forecast is performed on) is 00:00 UTC, September 1st, 2018.
items.capZh: 图7：盘古天气（顶部）、业务IFS（中部）和ERA5地面真值（底部）生成的3天天气预报可视化。左列和右列分别显示500 hPa位势（Z500）和850 hPa温度（T850）的图。输入时间点（即进行预报的时间）为2018年9月1日00:00 UTC。

items.en: The comparative results between Pangu-Weather and operational IFS are shown in Figure 1 (top) and Figure 5, where Pangu-Weather enjoys consistent gains (in all forecast times and for all variables) in forecast accuracy compared to operational IFS. The advantage becomes more significant as forecast time increases, implying that AI-based methods are better at capturing effective (though non-interpretable) patterns for medium-range weather forecast. Specifically, we note that the ‘forecast time gain’ of Pangu-Weather over operational IFS (i.e., the difference between forecast times at the same forecast accuracy) is more than 121212 hours for all variables and more than 242424 hours for specific humidity – this implies that AI-based methods are significantly better at forecasting specific variables.
items.zh: 盘古天气与业务IFS的比较结果如图1（顶部）和图5所示，盘古天气在所有预报时间和所有变量上的预报准确率均持续优于业务IFS。随着预报时间的增加，优势变得更加显著，这表明基于人工智能的方法更擅长捕捉中期天气预报的有效（尽管不可解释）模式。具体来说，我们注意到盘古天气相对于业务IFS的“预报时间增益”（即相同预报准确率下预报时间的差异）对于所有变量超过12小时，对于比湿超过24小时——这意味着基于人工智能的方法在预报特定变量方面显著更好。

items.en: Specifically, we investigate 500​h​P​a500hPa500\mathrm{hPa} geopotential (Z500) and 850​h​P​a850hPa850\mathrm{hPa} temperature (T850), the variables that were widely reported in prior AI-based methods. The quantitative comparison for these two variables is shown in Figure 1. As shown, the forecast accuracy of Pangu-Weather is consistently higher than that of operational IFS and FourCastNet, the previous best AI-based method (yet weaker than operational IFS). Quantitatively, for Z500, the 333-day and 555-day RMSEs (in m2/s2superscriptm2superscripts2\mathrm{m}^{2}/\mathrm{s}^{2}) of operational IFS are 152.8152.8152.8 and 333.7333.7333.7, respectively, and Pangu-Weather reduces them to 134.5134.5134.5 and 296.7296.7296.7 (133.9133.9133.9 and 294294294 if the December 2018 data are included). For T850, the 333-day and 555-day RMSEs (in KK\mathrm{K}) of operational IFS are 1.371.371.37 and 2.062.062.06, respectively, and Pangu-Weather reduces them to 1.141.141.14 and 1.791.791.79 (1.131.131.13 and 1.771.771.77 if the December 2018 data are included), claiming an over 10%percent1010\% relative error drop. The relative drop of RMSE is more than 10%percent1010\% in all scenarios, which also reflects in a ‘forecast time gain’ of 101010–151515 hours. When compared to FourCastNet, we observe even more significant accuracy gains – the relative reduction of RMSE is more than 30%percent3030\% in the above scenarios, and the ‘forecast time gain’ is also enlarged to more than 363636 hours.
items.zh: 具体来说，我们研究了500 hPa位势（Z500）和850 hPa温度（T850），这些变量在先前基于人工智能的方法中被广泛报告。这两个变量的定量比较如图1所示。如图所示，盘古天气的预报准确率始终高于业务IFS和FourCastNet（先前最好的基于人工智能的方法，但弱于业务IFS）。定量上，对于Z500，业务IFS的3天和5天RMSE（单位为m^2/s^2）分别为152.8和333.7，盘古天气将其降低到134.5和296.7（如果包含2018年12月的数据，则为133.9和294）。对于T850，业务IFS的3天和5天RMSE（单位为K）分别为1.37和2.06，盘古天气将其降低到1.14和1.79（如果包含2018年12月的数据，则为1.13和1.77），相对误差下降超过10%。在所有情况下，RMSE的相对下降超过10%，这也反映在10-15小时的“预报时间增益”上。与FourCastNet相比，我们观察到更显著的准确率提升——在上述情况下，RMSE的相对减少超过30%，“预报时间增益”也扩大到超过36小时。

items.en: Pangu-Weather forecasts four important surface variables, i.e., 2m temperature, u𝑢u-component and v𝑣v-component of 10m wind speed, and mean sea level pressure. Compared to the upper-air variables, these surface variables have close and complex relationship to topography and human activities (e.g., urban heat island effect) and thus are more difficult to forecast. The testing environment is established in a similar way of forecasting upper-air variables888The test points on Jan 1st, 2018 are excluded due to the overlap with training data.. Quantitative comparisons are made between Pangu-Weather and previous best NWP method (i.e., operational IFS) and AI-based method (i.e., FourCastNet [14]), where the numerical results of FourCastNet and operational IFS are fetched from the plots in the paper999For a fair comparison to FourCastNet, we follow the protocol to set the test interval (the gap between neighborhood test time points) to be 999 days for T2M and 222 days for U10 and V10, albeit we can produce forecast results every single hour. We also report the RMSE values using a fixed 666-hour interval in the following part.. The comparative results are shown in Figure 6. Again, Pangu-Weather outperforms both competitors in terms of forecast accuracy in all forecast times, for all variables, and the advantage becomes more significant as forecast time increases. The ‘forecast time gain’ of all these variables is about 181818 hours, slightly longer than the gain in forecasting upper-air variables.
items.zh: 盘古天气预报四个重要的地表变量，即2米温度、10米风速的u分量和v分量以及平均海平面气压。与高空变量相比，这些地表变量与地形和人类活动（如城市热岛效应）有密切而复杂的关系，因此更难预报。测试环境以类似预报高空变量的方式建立。定量比较在盘古天气与之前最好的数值天气预报方法（即业务IFS）和基于人工智能的方法（即FourCastNet [14]）之间进行，其中FourCastNet和业务IFS的数值结果从论文的图中获取。比较结果如图6所示。再次，盘古天气在所有预报时间和所有变量上的预报准确率均优于两个竞争对手，并且随着预报时间的增加，优势变得更加显著。所有这些变量的“预报时间增益”约为18小时，略长于预报高空变量时的增益。

items.en: We investigate the forecast accuracy of separate variables. For 2m temperature (T2M), the 333-day and 555-day RMSEs (in KK\mathrm{K}) are 1.341.341.34 and 1.751.751.75 for operational IFS, 1.391.391.39 and 2.002.002.00 for FourCastNet, and Pangu-Weather reduces them to 1.051.051.05 and 1.531.531.53 (1.061.061.06 and 1.521.521.52 with a 666-hour test interval), respectively. For u𝑢u-component of 10m wind speed (U10), the 333-day and 555-day RMSEs (in m/sms\mathrm{m}/\mathrm{s}) are 1.941.941.94 and 2.902.902.90 for operational IFS, 2.242.242.24 and 3.413.413.41 for FourCastNet, and Pangu-Weather reduces them to 1.611.611.61 and 2.532.532.53 (1.611.611.61 and 2.552.552.55 for the test data in 2018 with a 666-hour interval), respectively. We omit the numerical comparison for v𝑣v-component of 10m wind speed (V10) since it is almost the same as that of U10.
items.zh: 我们研究了不同变量的预报精度。对于2米温度（T2M），业务IFS的3天和5天RMSE（单位：K）分别为1.34和1.75，FourCastNet为1.39和2.00，而盘古天气将其降低至1.05和1.53（测试间隔为6小时时为1.06和1.52）。对于10米风速的u分量（U10），业务IFS的3天和5天RMSE（单位：m/s）分别为1.94和2.90，FourCastNet为2.24和3.41，而盘古天气将其降低至1.61和2.53（2018年测试数据间隔6小时时为1.61和2.55）。我们省略了10米风速v分量（V10）的数值比较，因为它与U10几乎相同。

items.en: We have the forecast results for the variable of mean sea level pressure (MSLP) but we cannot provide the quantitative comparison due to the unavailability of data from the ECMWF server. We believe that our forecast is the best candidate because of two reasons. On the one hand, According to prior experiences [50], a model that better forecasts on other surface variables (i.e., T2M, U10, V10) also enjoys a higher forecast accuracy on MSLP. On the other hand, we make use of our forecast of MSLP for tracking tropical cyclones – as shown in Section 4.2.2, Pangu-Weather achieves much better results, quantitatively and qualitatively, than operational IFS in forecasting 888888 named tropical cyclones in the year of 2018.
items.zh: 我们拥有平均海平面气压（MSLP）变量的预报结果，但由于无法从ECMWF服务器获取数据，无法提供定量比较。我们认为我们的预报是最佳候选，原因有二。一方面，根据先前经验[50]，在其他地面变量（即T2M、U10、V10）上预报更好的模型在MSLP上也具有更高的预报精度。另一方面，我们利用MSLP预报来追踪热带气旋——如第4.2.2节所示，盘古天气在预报2018年88个命名热带气旋方面，定量和定性上都优于业务IFS。

items.en: In addition, we evaluate Pangu-Weather on WeatherBench [10], a benchmark for low-resolution weather forecast. For this purpose, we simply down-sample the forecast results of Pangu-Weather by 22.5×22.5\times into a coarse grid with a spatial resolution of 5.625∘×5.625∘superscript5.625superscript5.6255.625^{\circ}\times 5.625^{\circ}, and compare the results to the down-sampled ERA5 ground-truth. Quantitatively, operational IFS reported 333-day/555-day RMSEs of T2M101010We only show the comparison on T2M, because WeatherBench evaluated the forecast results of T850 and Z500 on the 2017 subset which is part of our training data. being 1.35/1.771.351.771.35/1.77 on WeatherBench, and Pangu-Weather improves the results to 1.041.041.04/1.511.511.51, respectively.
items.zh: 此外，我们在WeatherBench[10]（一个低分辨率天气预报基准）上评估了盘古天气。为此，我们简单地将盘古天气的预报结果下采样22.5倍，得到空间分辨率为5.625°×5.625°的粗网格，并将结果与下采样的ERA5真实值进行比较。定量上，业务IFS在WeatherBench上的T2M（我们仅展示T2M的比较，因为WeatherBench评估了T850和Z500在2017年子集上的预报结果，而该子集是我们的训练数据的一部分）的3天/5天RMSE为1.35/1.77，而盘古天气将其分别改善至1.04/1.51。

items.capEn: Figure 8: Hourly forecast results for two upper-air variables (500​h​P​a500hPa500\mathrm{hPa} geopotential, Z500, and 500​h​P​a500hPa500\mathrm{hPa} specific humidity, Q500) and two surface variables (2m temperature, T2M, and u𝑢u-component of 10m wind speed, U10). The forecast time ranges from 111 hour to 777 days (168168168 hour), and both latitude-weighted RMSE (lower is better) and ACC (higher is better) are reported. The input time points are chosen from the 201820182018 data – since no comparison is made, we only exclude the data on January 1st due to the overlaps with the training set.
items.capZh: 图8：两个高空变量（500hPa位势高度Z500和500hPa比湿Q500）和两个地面变量（2米温度T2M和10米风速u分量U10）的逐小时预报结果。预报时间范围从1小时到7天（168小时），报告了纬度加权RMSE（越低越好）和ACC（越高越好）。输入时间点选自2018年数据——由于未进行比较，我们仅排除了1月1日的数据，因其与训练集重叠。

items.en: In Figure 7, we first visualize the 727272-hour forecast of Pangu-Weather on two upper-air variables, namely, Z500 and T850, and compare the results to operational IFS and the ERA5 ground-truth. Both forecast results are sufficiently close to the ground-truth, yet one can detect the differences between them. Pangu-Weather produce smoother contour lines, implying that the model tends to forecast similar values for neighboring regions – this is a typical property of deep neural networks in learning from large-scale datasets. In comparison, operational IFS tends to preserve small-scale structures, yet such predictions are not guaranteed to be correct. As shown in the previous part, Pangu-Weather enjoys the advantage of overall forecast accuracy.
items.zh: 在图7中，我们首先可视化了盘古天气对两个高空变量（Z500和T850）的72小时预报，并将结果与业务IFS和ERA5真实值进行比较。两个预报结果都足够接近真实值，但可以检测到它们之间的差异。盘古天气产生更平滑的等值线，这意味着模型倾向于预测相邻区域的相似值——这是深度神经网络从大规模数据集中学习的典型特性。相比之下，业务IFS倾向于保留小尺度结构，但此类预测不一定正确。如前面部分所示，盘古天气在整体预报精度上具有优势。

items.en: In Figure 1 (top left), we also visualize the 727272-hour forecast of Pangu-Weather on two surface variables, namely, 2m temperature (T2M) and 10m wind speed (u2+v2superscript𝑢2superscript𝑣2\sqrt{u^{2}+v^{2}}). As can be seen, Pangu-Weather produces high-resolution forecasts that are (i) very close to the ERA5 ground-truth (also refer to the previous part for quantitative results) and (ii) sufficient to preserve most of small-scale structures of surface variables.
items.zh: 在图1（左上）中，我们还可视化了盘古天气对两个地面变量（2米温度T2M和10米风速√(u²+v²)）的72小时预报。可以看出，盘古天气产生的高分辨率预报（i）非常接近ERA5真实值（定量结果也请参考前面部分），并且（ii）足以保留地面变量的大部分小尺度结构。

items.capEn: Figure 9: Plots of RQE values with respect to forecast time for two upper-air variables (500​h​P​a500hPa500\mathrm{hPa} u𝑢u-component of wind speed, U500, and 500​h​P​a500hPa500\mathrm{hPa} specific humidity, Q500) and one surface variables (u𝑢u-component of 10m wind speed, U10).
items.capZh: 图9：两个高空变量（500hPa风速u分量U500和500hPa比湿Q500）和一个地面变量（10米风速u分量U10）的RQE值随预报时间的变化图。

items.en: We investigate the monthly averaged 555-day latitude-weighted ACC of four upper-air variables, namely, geopotential (Z), specific humidity (Q), temperature (T), and u𝑢u-component of wind speed (U), all at the pressure level of 500​h​P​a500hPa500\mathrm{hPa}. The comparison between Pangu-Weather and operational IFS is shown in Figure 1 (top right). Pangu-Weather outperforms operational IFS in every single month, demonstrating the stability of forecast. More importantly, the advantage of Pangu-Weather becomes more significant in the worst performed months (e.g., April and May), implying that AI-based methods have learned useful and complementary knowledge from large data. We conjecture that such knowledge may correspond to (i) unknown or unformulated atmospheric procedures or (ii) better manipulations with missing factors. Studying these factors may be an interesting topic for meteorologists.
items.zh: 我们研究了四个高空变量（位势高度Z、比湿Q、温度T和风速u分量U，均在500hPa气压层）的月平均5天纬度加权ACC。盘古天气与业务IFS的比较如图1（右上）所示。盘古天气在每一个月都优于业务IFS，展示了预报的稳定性。更重要的是，在表现最差的月份（如4月和5月），盘古天气的优势更加显著，这表明基于AI的方法从大数据中学习到了有用且互补的知识。我们推测这些知识可能对应于（i）未知或未公式化的大气过程，或（ii）对缺失因素的更好处理。研究这些因素对气象学家来说可能是一个有趣的话题。

items.en: A clear advantage of Pangu-Weather lies in its ability of performing hourly weather forecast. We plot the hourly RMSE and ACC values for two upper-air variables (Z500 and Q500) and two surface variables (T2M and U10) in Figure 8. Note that we have applied a greedy algorithm based on hierarchical temporal aggregation as elaborated in Section 3.4. For some variables (e.g., Q500 and T2M), we observe a clear trend that forecast accuracy drops with the number of iterations, e.g., 333 calls are required for a 727272-hour forecast, while 888 calls are required for a 717171-hour forecast (i.e., 71=24+24+6+6+6+3+1+171242466631171=24+24+6+6+6+3+1+1), and thus the 717171-hour accuracy is much lower due to cumulative forecast errors. While we can easily improve the accuracy by moving the time point back (e.g., performing 727272-hour forecast using 111-hour-earlier weather states for 717171-hour forecast), we just offer the original forecast results here to show this important phenomenon. This calls for an advanced temporal aggregation algorithm in the future – one possibility lies in integrating the time axis into input data and making use of 4D deep neural networks, but this implies much heavier computational overheads.
