items.zh: 盘古天气的一个明显优势在于其进行逐小时天气预报的能力。我们在图8中绘制了两个高空变量（Z500和Q500）和两个地面变量（T2M和U10）的逐小时RMSE和ACC值。注意，我们应用了基于分层时间聚合的贪心算法，如第3.4节所述。对于某些变量（例如Q500和T2M），我们观察到预报精度随迭代次数下降的明显趋势，例如，72小时预报需要3次调用，而71小时预报需要8次调用（即71=24+24+6+6+6+3+1+1），因此由于累积预报误差，71小时精度要低得多。虽然我们可以通过将时间点回移（例如，使用提前1小时的气象状态进行72小时预报以实现71小时预报）来轻松提高精度，但我们在此仅提供原始预报结果以展示这一重要现象。这呼唤未来出现先进的时间聚合算法——一种可能性是将时间轴集成到输入数据中并利用4D深度神经网络，但这意味着更重的计算开销。

items.en: A clear advantage of AI-based methods lies in the inference speed. FourCastNet [14] claimed a 45,000×45\rm{,}000\times speedup over the traditional NWP method, and Pangu-Weather is comparable with FourCastNet (see the next paragraph). Considering the advantage in forecast accuracy, Pangu-Weather has the potentials of replacing conventional NWP, enabling real-time weather forecast to be performed any time (e.g., once a second), rather than the current status that weather forecast is performed merely a few times per day. A few side benefits are expected. (i) It largely increases the timeliness of short-range weather forecast which is important in warning about short-term extreme weathers, e.g., cloudbursts. (ii) It enables large-member ensemble forecast which is important for meteorologists to pay attentions to the sensitive weather factors or variables.
items.zh: 基于AI的方法的一个明显优势在于推理速度。FourCastNet[14]声称比传统NWP方法加速45,000倍，而盘古天气与FourCastNet相当（见下一段）。考虑到预报精度的优势，盘古天气有潜力取代传统NWP，实现实时天气预报随时进行（例如每秒一次），而不是目前每天仅进行几次天气预报的状态。预计会有一些附带好处。（i）它大大增加了短程天气预报的及时性，这对于预警短期极端天气（例如暴雨）非常重要。（ii）它使得大集合预报成为可能，这对于气象学家关注敏感天气因素或变量非常重要。

items.en: The inference speed of Pangu-Weather is comparable to that of FourCastNet [14], implying that using holistic 3D deep neural networks for inference is slightly more costly than using 2D counterparts, yet the accuracy is much higher. In a system-level comparison, FourCastNet requires 280​m​s280ms280\mathrm{ms} for inferring a 242424-hour forecast on an NVIDIA Tesla-A100 GPU (312312312 TeraFLOPS), while Pangu-Weather needs 1,400​m​s1400ms1\rm{,}400\mathrm{ms} on an NVIDIA Tesla-V100 GPU (120120120 TeraFLOPS). Taking GPU performance into consideration, Pangu-Weather is about 50%percent5050\% slower than FourCastNet, while still being one of the fastest systems for high-resolution, global weather forecast.
items.zh: 盘古天气的推理速度与FourCastNet[14]相当，这意味着使用整体3D深度神经网络进行推理比使用2D对应物略昂贵，但精度要高得多。在系统级比较中，FourCastNet在NVIDIA Tesla-A100 GPU（312 TeraFLOPS）上推理24小时预报需要280毫秒，而盘古天气在NVIDIA Tesla-V100 GPU（120 TeraFLOPS）上需要1,400毫秒。考虑到GPU性能，盘古天气比FourCastNet慢约50%，但仍然是用于高分辨率全球天气预报的最快系统之一。

items.en: To further accelerate Pangu-Weather, we can train models with larger lead times (e.g., 727272 hours) so as to reduce the number of temporal aggregations. We expect to explore this direction in the near future.
items.zh: 为了进一步加速盘古天气，我们可以训练具有更大提前时间（例如72小时）的模型，以减少时间聚合的次数。我们期望在不久的将来探索这一方向。

items.en: Extreme weather forecast plays a vital role of global weather forecast. Despite rare occurrence, extreme weather events like hurricanes can bring tremendous casualty and economical loss. Therefore, it is expected that weather forecast systems can warn about upcoming extreme weather events that complement daily weather reports.
items.zh: 极端天气预报在全球天气预报中起着至关重要的作用。尽管罕见，但像飓风这样的极端天气事件可能带来巨大的人员伤亡和经济损失。因此，期望天气预报系统能够预警即将到来的极端天气事件，以补充日常天气预报。

items.en: In this subsection, we investigate the ability of Pangu-Weather in forecasting extreme weather events and compare the ability to that of conventional NWP methods, i.e., operational IFS. We first introduce a quantitative metric named relative quantile error to measure the overall tendency in Section 4.2.1, and then study a special and important case, i.e., tracking tropical cyclones, in Section 4.2.2.
items.zh: 在本小节中，我们研究了盘古天气在预报极端天气事件方面的能力，并将其与传统NWP方法（即业务IFS）进行比较。我们首先在第4.2.1节中引入一个名为相对分位数误差的定量指标来衡量整体趋势，然后在第4.2.2节中研究一个特殊且重要的案例，即追踪热带气旋。

items.en: We use a similar approach to [51] to compare the values of top-level quantiles calculated on the forecast result and ground-truth. Mathematically, we set D=50𝐷50D=50 percentiles, denoted as q1,…,qDsubscript𝑞1…subscript𝑞𝐷q_{1},\ldots,q_{D}. Following FourCastNet [14], we set q1=90%subscript𝑞1percent90q_{1}=90\%, qD=99.99%subscript𝑞𝐷percent99.99q_{D}=99.99\%, and the intermediate ones are linearly distributed between q1subscript𝑞1q_{1} and qDsubscript𝑞𝐷q_{D} in the logarithmic scale. Then, the corresponding quantiles, denoted as Q1,…,QDsubscript𝑄1…subscript𝑄𝐷Q_{1},\ldots,Q_{D}, are computed individually for each pair of weather variable and forecast time, e.g., for all 333-day forecasts of U10, pixel-wise values are summarized from all frames for statistics. Finally, the relative quantile error (RQE) is used for measuring the difference between the ground-truth and any weather forecast system:
items.zh: 我们采用类似于[51]的方法来比较根据预报结果和真实值计算的高层分位数的值。数学上，我们设置D=50个百分位数，记为q1,…,qD。遵循FourCastNet[14]，我们设置q1=90%，qD=99.99%，中间值在对数尺度上在q1和qD之间线性分布。然后，相应的分位数（记为Q1,…,QD）针对每对天气变量和预报时间单独计算，例如，对于所有U10的3天预报，像素级值从所有帧中汇总以进行统计。最后，相对分位数误差（RQE）用于衡量真实值与任何天气预报系统之间的差异：

items.en: where Qdsubscript𝑄𝑑Q_{d} and Q^dsubscript^𝑄𝑑\hat{Q}_{d} are different versions of the d𝑑d-th quantile calculated on the ERA5 ground-truth and the system being investigated, e.g., Pangu-Weather. RQE can measure the overall tendency, where RQE<0RQE0\mathrm{RQE}<0 and RQE>0RQE0\mathrm{RQE}>0 imply that the forecast system tends to underestimate and overestimate the intensity of extremes, respectively.
items.zh: 其中Qd和Q̂d分别是根据ERA5真实值和被研究系统（例如盘古天气）计算的不同版本的第d个分位数。RQE可以衡量整体趋势，其中RQE<0和RQE>0分别表示预报系统倾向于低估和高估极端事件的强度。

items.en: In Figure 9, we plot the RQE values for two upper-air variables (U500, V500) and one surface variable (U10) with respect to forecast time. Pangu-Weather is compared to both operational IFS and FourCastNet (only for U10). As seen, all the three methods tend to underestimate extremes, i.e., the RQE values are consistently smaller than 00. The absolute RQE values reported by AI-based methods generally grow (i.e., heavier underestimation) with forecast time, while that of operational IFS remains mostly unchanged. We attribute the above observation to the cumulative forecast errors of AI-based methods – compared to FourCastNet, Pangu-Weather significantly alleviates such errors with hierarchical temporal aggregation (see Section 3.4). Compared to operational IFS, Pangu-Weather shows higher absolute RQE values (i.e., heavier underestimation) for U500 and lower absolute RQE values (i.e., lighter underestimation) for Q500. Regarding U10, Pangu-Weather is much better than operational IFS for up to 333 days (727272 hours) and then becomes slightly worse due to cumulative forecast errors.
items.zh: 在图9中，我们绘制了两个高空变量（U500、V500）和一个地面变量（U10）的RQE值随预报时间的变化。盘古天气与业务IFS和FourCastNet（仅U10）进行了比较。可以看出，所有三种方法都倾向于低估极端事件，即RQE值始终小于0。基于AI的方法报告的绝对RQE值通常随预报时间增长（即低估更严重），而业务IFS的RQE值基本保持不变。我们将上述观察归因于基于AI方法的累积预报误差——与FourCastNet相比，盘古天气通过分层时间聚合（见第3.4节）显著减轻了此类误差。与业务IFS相比，盘古天气在U500上显示出更高的绝对RQE值（即更严重的低估），在Q500上显示出更低的绝对RQE值（即更轻的低估）。对于U10，盘古天气在3天（72小时）内明显优于业务IFS，之后由于累积预报误差而略差。

items.capEn: Figure 10: The comparison of mean direct position errors of tropical cyclone tracking between Pangu-Weather and ECMWF-HRES, where the results are obtained by averaging 888888 named tropical cyclones in 2018. We show the overall results (top), the results with respect to different basins, and the results with respect to different intensities (bottom).
items.capZh: 图10：盘古天气与ECMWF-HRES在热带气旋追踪中的平均直接位置误差比较，结果通过对2018年88个命名热带气旋取平均得到。我们展示了总体结果（上）、不同海盆的结果以及不同强度的结果（下）。

items.capEn: Figure 11: Left: the tracking of cyclone eyes for Hurricane Michael (2018-13) and Typhoon Ma-on (2022-09) by Pangu-Weather and ECMWF-HRES, with a comparison to the ground-truth (by IBTrACS). Right: an illustration of the tracking process, where we use Pangu-Weather as an example. It locates cyclone eye by checking four variables (from forecast results), namely, mean sea level pressure, 10m wind speed, thickness between 850​h​P​a850hPa850\mathrm{hPa} and 200​h​P​a200hPa200\mathrm{hPa}, and vorticity of 850​h​P​a850hPa850\mathrm{hPa}). The displayed figures correspond to the forecast of these variables at a forecast time of 727272 hours, and the forecast of cyclone eye is indicated using the tail of arrows.
items.capZh: 图11：左：盘古天气和ECMWF-HRES对飓风Michael（2018-13）和台风Ma-on（2022-09）的气旋眼追踪，并与真实值（来自IBTrACS）进行比较。右：追踪过程的示意图，以盘古天气为例。它通过检查四个变量（来自预报结果）来定位气旋眼，即平均海平面气压、10米风速、850hPa与200hPa之间的厚度以及850hPa涡度。显示的图形对应于这些变量在72小时预报时间时的预报，气旋眼的预报用箭头尾部指示。

items.capEn: Figure 12: The dynamic tracking results of cyclone eyes for Typhoon Kong-rey (2018-25) by Pangu-Weather and ECMWF-HRES, with a comparison to the ground-truth (by IBTrACS). We show six time points with the first one being 12:00 UTC, September 29th, 2018, and the time gap between neighboring points being 121212 hours. The historical (observed) path of cyclone eyes is shown in dashed. Mind the significant difference between Pangu-Weather and ECMWF-HRES (Pangu-Weather is significantly better) at the middle four time points.
items.capZh: 图12：盘古天气和ECMWF-HRES对台风Kong-rey（2018-25）气旋眼的动态追踪结果，并与真实值（来自IBTrACS）进行比较。我们展示了六个时间点，第一个为2018年9月29日12:00 UTC，相邻点之间的时间间隔为12小时。气旋眼的历史（观测）路径用虚线显示。注意在中间四个时间点，盘古天气与ECMWF-HRES之间存在显著差异（盘古天气明显更好）。

items.en: We study a special case of extreme weather forecast, namely, tracking tropical cyclones. Note that we follow the conventions to focus on forecasting the eye of tropical cyclones rather than the intensity111111Due to the limited resolution of EDA systems, reanalysis data like ERA5 always underestimate cyclones intensity (e.g., minimum pressure and maximum wind speed) significantly [52, 53, 54]. Trained on ERA5, it is difficult for Pangu-Weather to forecast the intensity accurately (e.g., the predicted minimum pressure is often 50​h​P​a50hPa50\mathrm{hPa} higher than the ground-truth), while the path tracking accuracy is reasonable (see the later results). In the future, if higher-resolution, unbiased weather data (especially tropical cyclone data) are provided, it is very likely that Pangu-Weather can be directly trained or fine-tuned on these data for more accurate intensity forecast.. Hence, in this part, we report the averaged distance between the ground-truth and predicted cyclone eyes.
items.zh: 我们研究极端天气预报的一个特例，即追踪热带气旋。注意，我们遵循惯例，专注于预测热带气旋的眼部而非强度¹¹¹¹¹¹由于EDA系统的分辨率有限，ERA5等再分析数据总是显著低估气旋强度（例如，最低气压和最大风速）[52, 53, 54]。在ERA5上训练后，盘古天气难以准确预测强度（例如，预测的最低气压通常比真实值高50 hPa），而路径追踪精度是合理的（见后续结果）。未来，如果提供更高分辨率、无偏的天气数据（尤其是热带气旋数据），盘古天气很可能可以直接在这些数据上训练或微调，以实现更准确的强度预测。因此，在本部分中，我们报告真实气旋眼与预测气旋眼之间的平均距离。

items.en: To track the eye of a tropical cyclone, we follow [55] to find the local minimum of mean sea level pressure (MSLP). Specifically, we follow [54] to set the lead time to be 666 hours. Given the starting time point and the corresponding (initial) position of a cyclone eye, we iteratively call for forecasting the 666-hour-later weather states and look for a local minimum of MSLP that satisfies the following conditions:
items.zh: 为了追踪热带气旋的眼部，我们遵循[55]的方法找到平均海平面气压（MSLP）的局部最小值。具体来说，我们遵循[54]将提前时间设为6小时。给定起始时间点和相应的（初始）气旋眼位置，我们迭代地调用模型预测6小时后的天气状态，并寻找满足以下条件的MSLP局部最小值：

items.en: There is a maximum of 850​h​P​a850hPa850\mathrm{hPa} relative vorticity that is larger than 5×10−55superscript1055\times 10^{-5} within a radius of 278​k​m278km278\mathrm{km} for the Northern Hemisphere, or a minimum that is smaller than 5×10−55superscript1055\times 10^{-5} for the Southern Hemisphere.
items.zh: 在北半球，278 km半径内存在一个大于5×10⁻⁵的850 hPa相对涡度最大值，或在南半球存在一个小于5×10⁻⁵的最小值。

items.en: There is a maximum of thickness between 850​h​P​a850hPa850\mathrm{hPa} and 200​h​P​a200hPa200\mathrm{hPa} within a radius of 278​k​m278km278\mathrm{km} when the cyclone is extratropical.
items.zh: 当气旋为温带气旋时，在278 km半径内存在一个850 hPa与200 hPa之间的厚度最大值。

items.en: The maximum 10m wind speed is larger than 8​m/s8ms8\mathrm{m}/\mathrm{s} within a radius of 278​k​m278km278\mathrm{km} when the cyclone is on land.
items.zh: 当气旋在陆地上时，在278 km半径内最大10米风速大于8 m/s。

items.en: Once the cyclone eye is located, the tracking algorithm continues to find the next position in a vicinity of 445​k​m445km445\mathrm{km}. The tracking algorithm terminates when no local minimum of MSLP is found to satisfy the above conditions.
items.zh: 一旦定位到气旋眼，追踪算法继续在445 km邻域内寻找下一个位置。当找不到满足上述条件的MSLP局部最小值时，追踪算法终止。

items.en: We refer to the International Best Track Archive for Climate Stewardship (IBTrACS) project [56, 57] which contains the best available estimations for tropical cyclones. We directly apply the above tracking algorithm on the deterministic forecast results of Pangu-Weather. We compare the tracking results to ECMWF-HRES, a strong competitor of cyclone tracking based on high-resolution (9​k​m×9​k​m9𝑘𝑚9𝑘𝑚9{km}\times 9{km}) operational weather forecast – clearly, a higher-resolution forecast is more accurate in locating tropical cyclone eyes. The ECMWF-HRES forecast of cyclone eyes are directly downloaded from the TIGGE archive [16]. For a fair comparison, we choose the tropical cyclones in 2018 (the year of the above quantitative study of deterministic forecasts) that appeared in both the IBTrACS project and the ECMWF-HRES forecasts. This results in a dataset (which we call TC2018) with 888888 named tropical cyclones.
items.zh: 我们参考了国际气候管理最佳路径档案（IBTrACS）项目[56, 57]，其中包含热带气旋的最佳可用估计。我们直接将上述追踪算法应用于盘古天气的确定性预报结果。我们将追踪结果与ECMWF-HRES进行比较，后者是基于高分辨率（9 km × 9 km）业务天气预报的强有力气旋追踪竞争者——显然，更高分辨率的预报在定位热带气旋眼方面更准确。ECMWF-HRES的气旋眼预报直接从TIGGE档案[16]下载。为了公平比较，我们选择了2018年（上述确定性预报定量研究的年份）在IBTrACS项目和ECMWF-HRES预报中均出现的热带气旋。这产生了一个包含88个命名热带气旋的数据集（我们称之为TC2018）。

items.en: We quantitatively compare the forecast accuracy of Pangu-Weather and ECMWF-HRES in TC2018. The 333-day and 555-day mean direct position errors (for cyclone eyes) of Pangu-Weather are 120.29​km120.29km120.29\mathrm{km} and 195.65​km195.65km195.65\mathrm{km}, respectively, which are significantly smaller than 162.28​km162.28km162.28\mathrm{km} and 272.10​km272.10km272.10\mathrm{km} reported by ECMWF-HRES. Figure 10 plots the mean direct position errors with respect to forecast time. One can see a clear advantage of Pangu-Weather over ECMWF-HRES over the entire dataset and within subsets of different basins or different intensities. Inheriting the property of deterministic forecast, the advantage becomes more significant when forecast time gets larger.
items.zh: 我们定量比较了盘古天气和ECMWF-HRES在TC2018上的预报精度。盘古天气的3天和5天平均直接位置误差（针对气旋眼）分别为120.29 km和195.65 km，显著小于ECMWF-HRES报告的162.28 km和272.10 km。图10绘制了相对于预报时间的平均直接位置误差。可以看出，在整个数据集以及不同海域或不同强度的子集中，盘古天气相对于ECMWF-HRES具有明显优势。继承了确定性预报的特性，随着预报时间变长，优势变得更加显著。

items.en: The tracking results of some representative cases are shown in Figures 1 and 11. We study four representative cases, three in 2018 and one in 2022. For Michael and Ma-on, we set the starting time point to be the earliest one in the ECMWF-HRES forecast, while for Kong-rey and Yutu, the starting points are postponed for a few days for better visualization. We use Pangu-Weather to forecast the entire cyclone path (i.e., until the cyclone dissipates), and compare the tracking results to ECMWF-HRES and the ground-truth. Again, Pangu-Weather produces much more accurate tracking results compared to ECMWF-HRES, and the advantage becomes large as forecast time increases. Below, we analyze these cases one-by-one.
items.zh: 一些代表性案例的追踪结果如图1和图11所示。我们研究了四个代表性案例，三个在2018年，一个在2022年。对于Michael和Ma-on，我们将起始时间点设为ECMWF-HRES预报中最早的时间点，而对于Kong-rey和Yutu，起始点推迟了几天以便更好地可视化。我们使用盘古天气预报整个气旋路径（即直到气旋消散），并将追踪结果与ECMWF-HRES和真实值进行比较。再次，盘古天气产生了比ECMWF-HRES更准确的追踪结果，并且随着预报时间增加，优势变大。下面，我们逐一分析这些案例。

items.en: Typhoon Kong-rey (2018-25)121212https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Typhoon_Kong-rey_(2018) is one of the most powerful tropical cyclones worldwide in 2018. It caused 444 fatalities and $171.5171.5171.5 million damage. As shown in Figure 1, ECMWF-HRES forecasts that Kong-rey would land on China, but it actually did not. Pangu-Weather, instead, produces accurate tracking results which almost coincide with the ground-truth. Also, Figure 12 shows the tracking results of Pangu-Weather and ECMWF-HRES at different time points – the forecast of Pangu-Weather barely changes with time, yet ECMWF-HRES arrives at the conclusion that Kong-rey would not land on China more than 484848 hours later than Pangu-Weather.
items.zh: 台风Kong-rey（2018-25）¹²¹²¹²https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Typhoon_Kong-rey_(2018)是2018年全球最强的热带气旋之一。它造成4人死亡和1.715亿美元损失。如图1所示，ECMWF-HRES预报Kong-rey将登陆中国，但实际上并未登陆。而盘古天气产生了准确的追踪结果，几乎与真实值重合。此外，图12显示了盘古天气和ECMWF-HRES在不同时间点的追踪结果——盘古天气的预报随时间几乎不变，而ECMWF-HRES比盘古天气晚48小时以上才得出Kong-rey不会登陆中国的结论。

items.en: Typhoon Yutu (2018-26)131313https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Typhoon_Yutu is an extremely powerful tropical cyclone that caused catastrophic destruction in the Mariana Islands and the Philippines. It also ties Kong-rey as the most powerful tropical cyclone worldwide in 2018, resulting in 303030 fatalities and $854.1854.1854.1 million damage. As shown in Figure 3.1, Pangu-Weather makes the correct forecast (Yutu goes to the Philippines) as early as 666 days before landing, while the forecast of ECMWF-HRES is dramatically incorrect (Yutu makes a big turn and heads to the northeast). ECMWF-HRES forecasts the correct direction more than 484848 hours later than Pangu-Weather.
items.zh: 台风Yutu（2018-26）¹³¹³¹³https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Typhoon_Yutu是一个极强的热带气旋，对马里亚纳群岛和菲律宾造成了灾难性破坏。它与Kong-rey并列2018年全球最强热带气旋，造成30人死亡和8.541亿美元损失。如图3.1所示，盘古天气在登陆前6天就做出了正确预报（Yutu前往菲律宾），而ECMWF-HRES的预报严重错误（Yutu大转弯并向东北方向移动）。ECMWF-HRES比盘古天气晚48小时以上才预报出正确方向。

items.en: Hurricane Michael (2018-13)141414https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Hurricane_Michael is the strongest hurricane of the 2018 Atlantic hurricane season. Michael became a Category-5 hurricane and landed on Florida on October 10th, 2018, resulting in 747474 fatalities and $25.525.525.5 billion damage. As shown in Figure 11, with a starting time that is more than 333 days earlier than landing, Both Pangu-Weather and ECMWF-HRES forecast the landfall on Florida, but the delay of predicted landing time is only 333 hours for Pangu-Weather but 181818 hours for ECMWF-HRES. In addition, Pangu-Weather shows great advantages in tracking Michael after it landed, while the tracking of ECMWF-HRES is much shorter and shifts to the east obviously.
items.zh: 飓风Michael（2018-13）¹⁴¹⁴¹⁴https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Hurricane_Michael是2018年大西洋飓风季最强的飓风。Michael成为5级飓风，于2018年10月10日登陆佛罗里达州，造成74人死亡和255亿美元损失。如图11所示，起始时间比登陆早3天以上时，盘古天气和ECMWF-HRES都预报了佛罗里达州登陆，但盘古天气预测的登陆时间仅延迟3小时，而ECMWF-HRES延迟18小时。此外，盘古天气在Michael登陆后的追踪中显示出巨大优势，而ECMWF-HRES的追踪短得多且明显偏东。

items.en: Typhoon Ma-on (2022-09)151515https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tropical_Storm_Ma-on_(2022) is a severe tropical storm that impacted the Philippines and China. Ma-on landed over Maconacon, Philippines on August 23rd and made a second landfall over Maoming, China on August 25th, resulting in 777 fatalities and $9.139.139.13 million damage. As shown in Figure 11, when the starting time point is about 333 days earlier than landing, ECMWF-HRES produces a wrong forecast that Ma-on would land on Zhuhai, China, while the forecast of Pangu-Weather is about right.
items.zh: 台风Ma-on（2022-09）¹⁵¹⁵¹⁵https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tropical_Storm_Ma-on_(2022)是一个影响菲律宾和中国的强热带风暴。Ma-on于8月23日在菲律宾Maconacon登陆，并于8月25日在中国茂名二次登陆，造成7人死亡和913万美元损失。如图11所示，当起始时间点比登陆早约3天时，ECMWF-HRES做出了错误预报，认为Ma-on将登陆中国珠海，而盘古天气的预报基本正确。

items.capEn: Figure 13: Comparison of control forecast and ensemble forecast results of Pangu-Weather. We display the latitude-weighted RMSE (lower is better) and ACC (higher is better) for two upper-air variables (500​h​P​a500hPa500\mathrm{hPa} geopotential, Z500, and 500​h​P​a500hPa500\mathrm{hPa} specific humidity, Q500) and two surface variables (2m temperature, T2M, and u𝑢u-component of 10m wind speed, U10).
items.capZh: 图13：盘古天气控制预报与集合预报结果的比较。我们展示了两个高空变量（500 hPa位势高度，Z500，和500 hPa比湿，Q500）和两个地面变量（2米温度，T2M，和10米风速的u分量，U10）的纬度加权RMSE（越低越好）和ACC（越高越好）。

items.en: The much better tracking results are directly owed to the higher deterministic forecast accuracy of Pangu-Weather. In the right part of Figure 11, we show how Pangu-Weather tracks Hurricane Michael and Typhoon Ma-on following the specified tracking algorithm. Among the four variables, mean sea level pressure and 10m wind speed are directly produced by deterministic forecast, and thickness and vorticity are mainly derived from geopotential and wind speed. This indicates that Pangu-Weather can produce intermediate results that support cyclone tracking, which further assists meteorologists in understanding and exploiting the tracking results.
items.zh: 更好的追踪结果直接归因于盘古天气更高的确定性预报精度。在图11的右侧，我们展示了盘古天气如何按照指定的追踪算法追踪飓风Michael和台风Ma-on。在四个变量中，平均海平面气压和10米风速由确定性预报直接产生，而厚度和涡度主要来自位势高度和风速。这表明盘古天气能够产生支持气旋追踪的中间结果，这进一步帮助气象学家理解和利用追踪结果。

items.en: In summary, the advantages of Pangu-Weather in tracking tropical cyclone eyes are mainly inherited from the good practice of deterministic forecast, in particular, the forecast of mean sea level pressure that is critical for locating cyclone eyes. Arguably, the proposed 3DEST architecture incorporates 3D information to improve the accuracy of important variables such as geopotential, wind speed, and mean sea level pressure. On the other hand, we notice that Pangu-Weather still heavily underestimates the intensity of tropical cyclones, arguably due to the same weakness of the ERA5 data. In the future, we expect higher-resolution, more accurate training data can be established for fine-tuning Pangu-Weather for these specific scenarios of extreme weather forecast. We also welcome meteorologists to offer expertise to improve the forecast of intensity.
items.zh: 总之，盘古天气在追踪热带气旋眼方面的优势主要继承自确定性预报的良好实践，特别是对于定位气旋眼至关重要的平均海平面气压的预报。可以说，所提出的3DEST架构整合了3D信息，提高了位势高度、风速和平均海平面气压等重要变量的精度。另一方面，我们注意到盘古天气仍然严重低估热带气旋的强度，这可能是由于ERA5数据的相同弱点。未来，我们期望建立更高分辨率、更准确的训练数据，用于微调盘古天气以应对这些极端天气预报的特定场景。我们也欢迎气象学家提供专业知识，以改进强度预报。

items.en: A core goal of ensemble weather forecast is to investigate the uncertainty of forecast systems, i.e., the change of forecast results with respect to small perturbations. Researchers mainly considered two types of uncertainty added to by (i) initial weather states and (ii) model parameters. The purpose is for diagnosing errors in observed or reanalyzed data (e.g., caused by assimilation [35]) and bias of both NWP and AI-based models (e.g., biasing towards false patterns).
items.zh: 集合天气预报的一个核心目标是研究预报系统的不确定性，即预报结果相对于小扰动的变化。研究人员主要考虑两种不确定性来源：（i）初始天气状态和（ii）模型参数。目的是诊断观测或再分析数据中的误差（例如，由同化引起的[35]）以及NWP和基于AI的模型的偏差（例如，偏向错误模式）。

items.en: The methodology of ensemble forecast mainly involves adding noise to either initial weather states or model parameters and observing the change of forecast results. Either of them requires performing the inference multiple times. Pangu-Weather, as an AI-based method, enjoys a much faster inference speed than conventional NWP methods, e.g., more than 10,000×10\rm{,}000\times faster than operational IFS. This offers an opportunity of performing large-member ensemble forecast in relatively low computational costs. In what follows, we offer a preliminary study of ensemble forecast based on Pangu-Weather, yet we believe that meteorologists can offer professional knowledge to further utilize the ability of ensemble forecast.
items.zh: 集合预报的方法主要涉及向初始天气状态或模型参数添加噪声，并观察预报结果的变化。这两种方法都需要多次执行推理。盘古天气作为一种基于AI的方法，其推理速度比传统NWP方法快得多，例如比业务IFS快10,000倍以上。这为以相对较低的计算成本进行大成员集合预报提供了机会。在下文中，我们基于盘古天气对集合预报进行了初步研究，但我们相信气象学家可以提供专业知识，进一步利用集合预报的能力。

items.en: In this paper, we mainly investigate the first line that adds perturbations to initial weather states. For simplicity, we follow FourCastNet [14] to set the perturbations to be random Perlin noise, while we believe that richer meteorologic knowledge can assist us in developing more advanced ensemble methods (e.g., based on singular vectors [58]). Mathematically, let the initial weather state be 𝐀t∗superscriptsubscript𝐀𝑡∗\mathbf{A}_{t}^{\ast}, and we randomly generate S=99𝑆99S=99 Perlin noise vectors of the same size of 𝐀t∗superscriptsubscript𝐀𝑡∗\mathbf{A}_{t}^{\ast}, denoted as 𝐏1,…,𝐏Ssubscript𝐏1…subscript𝐏𝑆\mathbf{P}_{1},\ldots,\mathbf{P}_{S}. The initial states are perturbed into 𝐀t∗+η​𝐏ssuperscriptsubscript𝐀𝑡∗𝜂subscript𝐏𝑠\mathbf{A}_{t}^{\ast}+\eta\mathbf{P}_{s}, where η=0.2𝜂0.2\eta=0.2 is the coefficient that controls the noise amplitude, and s=0,1,…,S𝑠01…𝑆s=0,1,\ldots,S where s=0𝑠0s=0 implies that no noise is added, i.e., 𝐏0≡𝟎subscript𝐏00\mathbf{P}_{0}\equiv\mathbf{0}. We feed all the S+1𝑆1S+1 initial states to the trained model and average the outputs as the final ensemble forecast result. Experiments are still performed on the ERA5 weather data in 2018, where deterministic forecast is taken as a natural baseline. As shown in Figure 13, the accuracy of 100100100-member ensemble forecast is slightly worse than single-member deterministic forecast in short-range (e.g., 111-day) weather forecast, but is significantly higher than deterministic forecast when forecast time is longer than 555 days. This aligns with our intuition and the observations of prior work [14], indicating that large-member ensemble forecast is especially useful when single-model accuracy becomes lower, yet it risks introducing unexpected noise that may cause accuracy drop when the deterministic forecast is accurate enough. In addition, ensemble forecast brings more benefits to the non-smooth variables such as 500​h​P​a500hPa500\mathrm{hPa} specific humidity (Q500) and 10m surface wind speed (U10), e.g., the latitude-weighted RMSEs of 777-day forecast for Z500 and U10 are reduced from 500.3500.3500.3 and 3.483.483.48 to 450.6450.6450.6 and 2.962.962.96, with relative drops of 10%percent1010\% and 15%percent1515\%, respectively.
items.zh: 在本文中，我们主要研究第一条路线，即向初始天气状态添加扰动。为简单起见，我们遵循FourCastNet[14]将扰动设置为随机Perlin噪声，但我们相信更丰富的气象学知识可以帮助我们开发更先进的集合方法（例如，基于奇异向量[58]）。数学上，设初始天气状态为A_t^*，我们随机生成S=99个与A_t^*大小相同的Perlin噪声向量，记为P_1, ..., P_S。初始状态被扰动为A_t^* + η P_s，其中η=0.2是控制噪声幅度的系数，s=0,1,...,S，其中s=0表示不添加噪声，即P_0 ≡ 0。我们将所有S+1个初始状态输入训练好的模型，并将输出平均作为最终的集合预报结果。实验仍在2018年的ERA5天气数据上进行，其中确定性预报作为自然基线。如图13所示，在短期（例如1天）天气预报中，100成员的集合预报精度略低于单成员确定性预报，但当预报时间超过5天时，其精度显著高于确定性预报。这与我们的直觉和先前工作的观察[14]一致，表明大成员集合预报在单模型精度较低时特别有用，但当确定性预报足够准确时，它可能引入意外噪声导致精度下降。此外，集合预报对非平滑变量（如500 hPa比湿（Q500）和10米地面风速（U10））带来更多好处，例如，Z500和U10的7天预报纬度加权RMSE分别从500.3和3.48降至450.6和2.96，相对下降10%和15%。

items.en: Temporarily, we do not study another line (i.e., adding perturbations to model parameters) because Pangu-Weather is based on deep neural networks that contains hundreds of millions of parameters, unlike conventional NWP models [6, 7] that contain much fewer yet physically meaningful parameters. In addition, the learned parameters are highly sensitive to a few random factors during the training procedure (e.g., random seeds, data sampling strategies, etc.) and thus are difficult to be perturbed for specific purposes. In the future, with the guidance from meteorologists, we expect to fine-tune the base Pangu-Weather models into a series of ‘child models’ for manipulating different factors.
items.zh: 暂时，我们不研究另一条路线（即向模型参数添加扰动），因为盘古天气基于包含数亿参数的深度神经网络，而传统NWP模型[6, 7]包含的参数少得多且具有物理意义。此外，学习到的参数对训练过程中的少数随机因素（例如随机种子、数据采样策略等）高度敏感，因此难以针对特定目的进行扰动。未来，在气象学家的指导下，我们期望将基础盘古天气模型微调为一系列“子模型”，以操控不同因素。

items.en: In this paper, we present Pangu-Weather, an AI-based system for numerical weather forecast. The technical contribution involves (i) designing the 3D Earth-specific transformer (3DEST) architecture and (ii) applying the hierarchical temporal aggregation strategy. By training deep neural networks on 393939 years of global weather data, Pangu-Weather, for the first time, surpasses the conventional NWP methods in terms of both accuracy and speed. Being efficient in inference, Pangu-Weather opens a window for meteorologists to integrate their knowledge to AI-based methods for more exciting applications.
items.zh: 在本文中，我们提出了盘古天气（Pangu-Weather），一种基于人工智能的数值天气预报系统。技术贡献包括（i）设计三维地球特定Transformer（3DEST）架构和（ii）应用分层时间聚合策略。通过在39年的全球天气数据上训练深度神经网络，盘古天气首次在精度和速度上超越了传统的数值天气预报方法。由于推理效率高，盘古天气为气象学家将他们的知识整合到基于人工智能的方法中打开了窗口，以实现更令人兴奋的应用。

items.en: Looking into the future, we expect that computational resource is the key to further improving the accuracy of weather forecast. According to our experiments, the training procedure has not yet arrived at full convergence, and there is much room left in terms of (i) incorporating more observation factors, (ii) integrating the time dimension and training 4D deep networks, and (iii) simply using deeper and/or wider networks. All of these require more powerful GPUs with larger memory and higher FLOPs.
items.zh: 展望未来，我们预计计算资源是进一步提高天气预报精度的关键。根据我们的实验，训练过程尚未完全收敛，在以下方面仍有很大空间：（i）纳入更多观测因素，（ii）整合时间维度并训练4D深度网络，以及（iii）简单地使用更深和/或更宽的网络。所有这些都需要更强大的GPU，具有更大的内存和更高的FLOPs。
